  ``core/llm/audit_lane.py``) caps the concurrent ``claude --print``
  subprocess fan-out from BOTH spawn sites вҖ” the self-improving-loop
  mutator runner
  (:func:`core.self_improving_loop.cli_subprocess.invoke_claude_cli`)
  and the Petri inspect_ai bridge
  (:class:`plugins.petri_audit.claude_cli_provider.ClaudeCliAPI.generate`)
  вҖ” at ``DEFAULT_CLAUDE_CLI_LANE_MAX=2``, one slot below the public
  3-4 burst-limiter floor (anthropics/claude-code#53922) so the
  operator's host Claude Code session has bucket headroom. Operators
  tune via ``GEODE_CLAUDE_CLI_LANE_MAX`` (positive int; empty /
  non-int / non-positive falls back to the default). Sync + async
  acquire helpers (:func:`acquire_claude_cli_lane` /
  :func:`acquire_claude_cli_lane_async`) share the SAME semaphore so
  the cap composes across the two spawn paths. The lane is mirrored
  in ``build_default_lanes`` for ``LaneQueue.status()`` dashboards.
  Phase 3 (paperclip OAuth-usage polling) will plug into the same
  acquire site to surface 5h-bucket telemetry before each slot grab.

### Changed

- **LaneQueue Phase 1 вҖ” hierarchy invariant restored**. The
  ``seed-generation`` workload lane defaulted to ``max_concurrent=16``
  while the ``global`` lane was capped at 8 вҖ” a textbook hierarchy
  violation. The 16-slot advertisement was a false signal: every leaf
  sub-agent call still funnels through ``global`` and blocked at 8.
  Dropped ``DEFAULT_SEED_PIPELINE_CONCURRENCY`` to ``4`` so workload
  cap composes correctly under the global cap, and added an explicit
  invariant test (``tests/test_lane_queue.py::TestAcquireAllSync::
  test_workload_cap_does_not_exceed_global_cap_invariant``) that fails
  if any registered workload lane defaults to a cap larger than
  ``DEFAULT_GLOBAL_CONCURRENCY``. The seed-generation orchestrator
  now walks the full OpenClaw hierarchy
  (``["session", "seed-generation", "global"]``) via the new sync
  ``LaneQueue.acquire_all`` API; the ``session`` key is
  ``seed-generation:<run_id>`` so concurrent ``Pipeline.run()`` calls
  for the same run serialize (kills the pre-PR race where two launches
  of the same ``run_id`` non-atomically incremented ``state.usd_spent``
  and friends). Re-raising the cap is gated on Phase 2 (sub-agent
  lane isolation) per
  [[project_lanequeue_handoff_2026_05_22]].

## [0.99.30] - 2026-05-22

> Reproducibility-ratchet trilogy completion (CSP-7 in-repo state +
> CSP-8 paper-В§3 LLM-clustering Proximity + CSP-9 plugin-colocated
> prompts) plus CSP-10 embedding plumbing drop + 2026-05-22 supported
> model lineup realign. Net effect вҖ” a fresh clone reproduces the
> seed-generation pipeline on any host without manual `~/.geode/`
> bootstrap or `.claude/agents/` setup, every role goes through the
> completion path, and `allowed_models` lists track today's Claude
> Code + Codex CLI surface.

### Changed

- **CSP-10 вҖ” supported-model lineup realigned + embedding plumbing removed**.
  Updated `seed_generation.plugin.toml` `allowed_models` lists so every
  role advertises only what Claude Code CLI (`claude-opus-4-7` /
  `claude-sonnet-4-6` / `claude-haiku-4-5`) and Codex CLI (`gpt-5.5` /
  `gpt-5.4` / `gpt-5.4-mini` / `gpt-5.3-codex`) actually expose as of
  2026-05-22 (cross-checked against `core/llm/model_pricing.toml`).
  Pilot now lists `gpt-5.3-codex` (Codex-specialized small) alongside
  `gpt-5.4-mini`; Ranker / Evolver / Meta-Reviewer added `gpt-5.5` so
  judge-panel / rewrite paths can opt into Codex without an explicit
  override. Dropped the legacy `o1-` / `o3-` reasoning-model prefix
  mappings from `picker._PROVIDER_PREFIX_MAP` вҖ” Codex CLI no longer
  exposes those families, so the picker now raises rather than
  silently binding them to the openai adapter.

- **CSP-10 вҖ” drop the embedding ``kind`` discriminator**. CSP-8 had
  reverted the only embedding consumer (Proximity) to the paper's
  LLM-clustering pattern, but left a `kind: Literal["completion",
  "embedding"]` field on `SeedRoleSpec` + `RoleBinding` plus dead
  branches in `pre_flight.check_auth` and `cost_preview._per_call_cost`
  for forward-compat. CSP-10 deletes the field, the picker's
  `text-embedding-` prefix mapping, the pre-flight embedding branch,
  and the manifest TOML's `kind = "completion"` line on the proximity
  role. Stale docstrings in `agents/__init__.py` (proximity 3-track
  blurb), `agents/base.py` (pre-CSP-8 bypass paragraph), and
  `agents/generator.py` (Proximity-computes-embeddings paragraph) are
  rewritten to match the post-CSP-8 LLM-clustering reality. Two new
  regression pins: `SeedRoleSpec.model_fields` must NOT contain
  `kind`, and the shipped TOML must NOT carry any bare `kind = "..."`
  line.

- **CSP-9 вҖ” seed-generation prompts colocated with the plugin package**.
  Moved the 8 seed-generation agent prompt files (`seed_critic.md`,
  `seed_evolver.md`, `seed_generator.md`, `seed_meta_reviewer.md`,
  `seed_pilot.md`, `seed_proximity.md`, `seed_ranker.md`,
  `seed_supervisor.md`) from project-wide `.claude/agents/` to
  plugin-local `plugins/seed_generation/agents/<role>.md` (basename
  stripped of the `seed_` namespace prefix вҖ” the plugin folder now
  disambiguates). Each file's frontmatter `name:` is unchanged (still
  `seed_<role>`) so every orchestrator call site continues to resolve
  the same `AgentDefinition`. `SubagentLoader` learned a new
  `agents_dirs:` kwarg and now scans `.claude/agents/` followed by
  `plugins/*/agents/` with first-wins basename dedup, so operator
  overrides in `.claude/agents/` still take precedence. Reproducibility
  ratchet: a fresh clone ships the prompts with the package rather
  than relying on developers to copy them into their override
  directory. Cascading docstring updates across `core/agent/loop/agent_loop.py`,
  `core/tools/seed_pool_search.py`, `plugins/seed_generation/orchestrator.py`,
  the 8 per-role `.py` modules, and the two grep-pin tests
  (`tests/core/tools/test_seed_generation_lit_toolkit.py`,
  `tests/test_self_improving_status_slash.py`,
  `tests/core/tools/test_toolkit_registry.py`,
  `docs/architecture/seed-generation-decision.md`).

- **CSP-8 вҖ” Proximity reverted to paper's LLM-clustering pattern**.
  Removed the pre-CSP-8 GEODE-specific 3-track majority vote
  (embedding cosine + 5-gram Jaccard + role overlap) along with
  PR-О 1 (proximity_graph), PR-О 2 (partial-survive floor), PR-О 3
  (goal-conditioning). Proximity now dispatches one
  ``seed_proximity`` sub-agent that emits ``similarity_clusters``
  with per-entry ``similarity_degree`` (``high``/``medium``/``low``);
  the orchestrator drops every candidate marked ``high``. The LLM
  keeps the "winner" of each high-similarity group OUT of the high
  list, so no tiebreak rule is needed in the orchestrator. Mirrors
  `open-coscientist/nodes/proximity.py` 1:1.

  Cascading changes:
  - `state.proximity_graph` field removed; replaced by
    `state.similarity_clusters` + `state.removed_duplicates` (paper
    schema).
  - `tournament.plan_matches` lost its `proximity_graph=` parameter
    and reverts to pure random-shuffle bracket seeding.
  - `core/tools/text_embed.py` (+ its test file) deleted вҖ” Proximity
    was the sole importer, no other GEODE surface uses embeddings.
  - `seed_generation.plugin.toml` proximity role flipped from
    `kind="embedding"` to `kind="completion"` (LLM call now); the
    `kind` field stays in the schema for forward-compat.
  - `seed_proximity.md` AgentDef rewritten вҖ” model bumped from
    `text-embedding-3-small` to `claude-sonnet-4-6`, system prompt
    documents the clustering contract.

### Changed

- **CSP-7 вҖ” symlink-free, in-repo state for cross-machine reproducibility**.
  Replaced the pre-CSP-7 `~/.geode/self-improving-loop/latest_seed_pool`
  + `latest_meta_review.json` symlink pair with a single JSON pointer
  at `state/self-improving-loop/latest_pointer.json` (stored as
  `STATE_ROOT`-relative paths so the file is portable across hosts).
  Moved per-run artefacts from `~/.geode/seed-generation/<run_id>/`
  to `state/seed-generation/<run_id>/` (env-overridable via
  `GEODE_STATE_ROOT`). `survivors/` directory now holds **file copies**
  of each survivor candidate `.md` rather than symlinks вҖ” the
  directory is self-contained on a fresh clone. Readers
  (`autoresearch.train._resolve_seed_select`,
  `plugins.seed_generation.baseline_reader.load_latest_meta_review`)
  consult the pointer instead of dereferencing symlinks. `state/`
  ships in-tree (`.gitkeep` + `README.md` committed) so the layout is
  part of the project; runtime artefacts stay `.gitignore`-d under
  `state/*` вҖ” paths in repo, content per-machine. Bumps the
  reproducibility ratchet: clone on a fresh box, no manual `~/.geode/`
  bootstrap, the seed-generation loop just picks up the prior run's
  pointer when it exists.

## [0.99.29] - 2026-05-22

> co-scientist port sprint completion (CSP-1 ~ CSP-6). Audit gaps
> В§1-A (Supervisor) / В§1-B (literature) / В§1-D (iteration) / В§1-L
> (Jaccard) all closed. arXiv:2502.18864 paper-fidelity restored on
> the LLM-self-improving-loop domain (PubMed/INDRA вҶ’ arXiv/seed_pool
> domain-shift, with intra-corpus grounding as the INDRA analogue).
> 6 feature PRs landed in one session: #1456 (toolkit infra), #1458
> (arxiv tools), #1459 (Generator+Critic grounding), #1460 (Supervisor),
> #1461 (iteration loop), #1463 (anti-convergence Jaccard). Sources
> at `mango-wiki/vault/projects/geode/synthesis/coscientist-port-audit-2026-05-22.md`
> + `coscientist-csp2-grounding-audit-2026-05-22.md`.

### Added

- **PR-CSA-1b вҖ” paperclip-pattern codex-cli provider (text-only, judge role).**
  Sibling of PR-CSA-1 (claude-cli) on the OpenAI/Codex side. Same paperclip
  motivation: route OAuth-backed `openai-codex/<model>` traffic through the
  local `codex` CLI subprocess rather than a raw OpenAI SDK call, so account-
  scoped rate limiting on the ChatGPT subscription tier behaves like the CLI
  user expects (no separate audit-quota burst on the Anthropic side, no
  per-token PAYG billing on the OpenAI side). Pattern verified against
  `~/workspace/paperclip/packages/adapters/codex-local/src/server/
  codex-args.ts:53` (argv shape) and `~/workspace/paperclip/packages/adapters/
  codex-local/src/server/parse.ts` (JSONL event shapes). **мӢ к·ң inspect_ai
  н”„лЎңл°”мқҙлҚ”** `plugins/petri_audit/codex_cli_provider.py::CodexCliAPI` вҖ”
  `@modelapi(name="codex-cli")` лЎң л“ұлЎқ. Identifier shape `codex-cli/<model>`.
  л§Ө `generate()` нҳём¶ңлӢ№ `codex exec --json --skip-git-repo-check --model <m>
  -` subprocess spawn (resume form: `codex exec --json resume <session_id> -`,
  subcommand position not flag), stdin мңјлЎң ChatMessage мӢңлҰ¬м–јлқјмқҙмҰҲ (CSA-1 кіј
  лҸҷмқјн•ң role-header sentinels), stdout per-line JSON events нҢҢмӢұ вҶ’ `ModelOutput`
  л№Ңл“ң. OAuth header / ChatGPT Plus token мқҖ codex CLI к°Җ лӮҙл¶Җ мІҳлҰ¬ вҖ” мҡ°лҰ¬лҠ”
  stdin/stdout л§Ң лӢӨлЈё. **CSA-1b boundary**: tool-use лҜём§Җмӣҗ (`generate(tools=
  [...])` вҶ’ `NotImplementedError("tool_use deferred to CSA-2b MCP bridge")`).
  judge role мІҳлҰ¬ м¶©л¶„. CSA-2b к°Җ MCP bridge лЎң auditor нҷңм„ұнҷ” вҖ” codex лҠ” first-
  class `codex mcp` / `codex mcp-server` м§Җмӣҗмқҙлқј claude мёЎліҙлӢӨ lower-risk.
  **мӢ к·ң лӘЁл“Ҳ (~470 LOC)** вҖ” `_resolve_codex_binary` (env `GEODE_CODEX_CLI_BIN`
  > PATH), `_resolve_timeout_s` (env `GEODE_CODEX_CLI_TIMEOUT_S`, кё°ліё 600 s),
  `build_codex_cli_argv` (resume / skip-git-repo-check / bypass-sandbox /
  reasoning-effort / extra-args мқёмһҗ вҖ” CSA-2b к№Ңм§Җ forward-compat),
  `serialise_messages_to_prompt` (CSA-1 кіј лҸҷмқјн•ң sentinel нҸ¬л§·),
  `parse_codex_jsonl_events` (forward-compatible вҖ” unknown event type л¬ҙмӢң),
  `_extract_agent_message` (`item.completed` + `item.type == "agent_message"`),
  `_extract_session_id` (`thread.started` мқҳ `thread_id`), `_extract_stop_reason`
  (`turn.completed` / `turn.failed` вҶ’ "stop"), `_extract_usage` (`turn.completed`
  мқҳ input/cached_input/output 3 н•„л“ң), `_extract_error` (`error` / `turn.failed`
  л©”мӢңм§Җ surface), `_run_codex_subprocess` (asyncio + timeout). **__init__ hook**
  вҖ” `plugins/petri_audit/__init__.py` мқҳ try/except register м¶”к°Җ (CSA-1 нҢЁн„ҙ
  кіј лҸҷмқј, audit extra л¶Җмһ¬мӢң graceful skip). **42 invariant test** вҖ” binary
  x4 / timeout x3 / argv x6 / serialiser x3 / parser x5 / event extractors x10
  / subprocess x4 / provider+boundary+round-trip x7. Quality gates clean (ruff
  + ruff format --check + mypy + 42/42 pytest). **Operator surface (CSA-1b)**:
  manual opt-in via `codex-cli/<model>` identifier in inspect eval argv.
  Default config лқјмҡ°нҢ… (manifest `[petri.adapter.openai.codex-cli]
  inspect_prefix` flip + `to_inspect_model` router мқҳ `source="openai-codex"`
  вҶ’ `codex-cli` ліҖнҷҳ) мқҖ CSA-3 (MCP bridge нӣ„) лЎң deferred вҖ” CSA-1 кіј л¬¶м–ҙм„ң
  м•Ҳм „н•ҳкІҢ м җм§„ лЎӨм•„мӣғ.

- **PR-CSA-1 вҖ” paperclip-pattern claude-cli provider (text-only, judge role).**
  Pattern B subscription audit мқҳ OAuth raw-SDK кІҪлЎңк°Җ 100% 429 enforcement
  л§һлҠ” м§„лӢЁ (trace-68931.log: 27/27 requests 429, retry-after 770 sec) нӣ„
  paperclip pattern (`~/workspace/paperclip/packages/adapters/claude-local/
  src/server/execute.ts:679` кІҖмҰқ) м°Ёмҡ©. **мӢ к·ң inspect_ai н”„лЎңл°”мқҙлҚ”**
  `plugins/petri_audit/claude_cli_provider.py::ClaudeCliAPI` вҖ”
  `@modelapi(name="claude-cli")` лЎң л“ұлЎқ. Identifier shape `claude-cli/
  <model>`. л§Ө `generate()` нҳём¶ңлӢ№ `claude --print - --output-format
  stream-json --verbose --model <m> --max-turns 1` subprocess spawn,
  stdin мңјлЎң ChatMessage мӢңлҰ¬м–јлқјмқҙмҰҲ (role-header sentinels), stdout
  stream-json events нҢҢмӢұ вҶ’ `ModelOutput` л№Ңл“ң. OAuth header лҠ” claude
  CLI к°Җ лӮҙл¶Җ мІҳлҰ¬ (`claude-code-20250219`, `oauth-2025-04-20`, session-
  aware) вҖ” мҡ°лҰ¬лҠ” stdin/stdout л§Ң лӢӨлЈё. **CSA-1 boundary**: tool-use лҜём§Җмӣҗ
  (`generate(tools=[...])` вҶ’ `NotImplementedError("tool_use deferred to
  CSA-2 MCP bridge")`). judge role мІҳлҰ¬ м¶©л¶„ (judge лҠ” custom tool м•Ҳ м”Җ).
  CSA-2 к°Җ MCP bridge лЎң auditor нҷңм„ұнҷ”. **мӢ к·ң лӘЁл“Ҳ (~570 LOC)** вҖ”
  `_resolve_claude_binary` (env `GEODE_CLAUDE_CLI_BIN` > PATH),
  `_resolve_timeout_s` (env `GEODE_CLAUDE_CLI_TIMEOUT_S`),
  `build_claude_cli_argv` (MCP / allowed-tools / extra-args мқёмһҗ вҖ” CSA-2
  к№Ңм§Җ forward-compat), `serialise_messages_to_prompt`, `parse_stream_json_
  events`, `_extract_assistant_text` (delta мҡ°м„  + result fallback),
  `_extract_stop_reason` (end_turnвҶ’stop / tool_useвҶ’tool_calls л§Өн•‘),
  `_extract_usage` (input/output/cache 4 н•„л“ң), `_run_claude_subprocess`
  (asyncio + timeout). **__init__ hook** вҖ” `plugins/petri_audit/__init__.py`
  мқҳ try/except register м¶”к°Җ (audit extra л¶Җмһ¬мӢң graceful skip).
  **37 invariant test** вҖ” binary x4 / timeout x3 / argv x5 / serialiser x4
  / parser x4 / text x2 / stop_reason x4 / usage x2 / subprocess x4 /
  provider+boundary+round-trip x5. Quality gates clean (ruff + ruff
  format --check + mypy + 37/37 pytest). **Operator surface (CSA-1)**:
  manual opt-in via `claude-cli/<model>` identifier in inspect eval argv.
  Default config лқјмҡ°нҢ… (manifest `[petri.adapter.anthropic.claude-cli]
  inspect_prefix`) flip мқҖ CSA-3 (MCP bridge нӣ„) лЎң deferred вҖ” м•Ҳм „н•ң м җм§„
  лЎӨм•„мӣғ.

- **Evolver anti-convergence Jaccard guard (CSP-6)** вҖ” Hoisted
  `_shingles` / `_jaccard` out of
  `plugins/seed_generation/agents/proximity.py` into the new
  `core/text/similarity.py` module (`shingles`, `jaccard_similarity`,
  `text_jaccard`); proximity.py retains the private-name aliases as
  compatibility shims. The Evolver phase now runs an
  ``_is_near_duplicate`` post-check on every ok-verdict spawn вҖ” if
  the evolved body's 5-gram Jaccard against any already-admitted
  sibling OR its parent candidate exceeds 0.70 the row is dropped
  (verdict coerced to ``evolution_skipped``, parent stays). Catches
  the "LLM thinks it diversified but actually didn't" failure mode
  that the Evolver's own verdict can miss. Defensive on I/O blips:
  unreadable evolved files admit the row (fail-open, log WARNING)
  rather than mask legitimate evolutions. Mirrors the original
  co-scientist ``DUPLICATE_SIMILARITY_THRESHOLD = 0.70``
  (``open-coscientist/nodes/evolve.py:14``) вҖ” closes audit В§1-L.

- **Iteration loop вҖ” paper В§3 (CSP-5)** вҖ”
  `plugins/seed_generation/orchestrator.Pipeline.run()` now wraps the
  phase walk in an outer `for iteration in range(max_iterations + 1)`
  loop. Iteration 0 runs the full `_PHASE_ORDER`
  (supervisor вҶ’ вҖҰ вҶ’ meta_reviewer). Iterations 1..N run the new
  `_ITERATION_PHASE_ORDER` cycle (critic вҶ’ pilot вҶ’ ranker вҶ’ evolver вҶ’
  meta_reviewer) against the previous iteration's evolved candidates,
  via the `_promote_evolved_for_iteration` helper that replaces (not
  extends) `state.candidates` with `state.evolved_candidates` and
  clears the per-iteration ephemera (reflections / pilot_scores /
  elo_ratings / survivors). Iteration short-circuits with an
  `iteration_skipped` event when the Evolver produced nothing вҖ” no
  empty cycles. `PipelineState.max_iterations` (default 0 preserves
  the pre-CSP-5 single-pass behaviour) + `current_iteration` cursor
  are persisted in `state.json` so a replay knows how many cycles
  ran. CLI exposes `--max-iterations / -i` (0..10) on
  `geode audit-seeds generate`.

- **Supervisor phase вҖ” run-level strategy synthesis (CSP-4)** вҖ” New
  Phase 0 of the seed-generation pipeline (paper В§3 Supervisor).
  `plugins/seed_generation/agents/supervisor.py` dispatches one Opus
  sub-agent at the start of every run; the sub-agent
  (`.claude/agents/seed_supervisor.md`) reads target_dim + cohort +
  baseline-snapshot / meta-review-snapshot summaries and emits one
  canonical strategy as `state.supervisor_guidance`
  (`research_goal_analysis` + per-phase `phase_guidance` for
  generation/critique/evolution + `session_summary`). Generator,
  Critic, and Evolver now prefix the relevant `phase_guidance.*`
  entry onto each per-candidate sub-agent description via the new
  `baseline_reader.format_supervisor_block` helper вҖ” sibling to the
  pre-CSP-4 evidence + priors prefixes. The Supervisor phase is
  OPTIONAL: when no Supervisor agent is registered (test fixtures
  that mock a subset of roles, pre-CSP-4 callers), the phase short-
  circuits with a `phase_skipped` journal event and
  `state.supervisor_guidance` stays at its empty-dict default вҖ” no
  downstream change. `_state_to_json` persists the guidance so
  `state.json` replay carries the same strategy the live run
  consumed.

- **Generator + Critic literature grounding (CSP-3)** вҖ” The
  `seed_generation` and `seed_critique` toolkits in `toolkits.toml`
  now fold in the `literature_research` kit (via `includes:`), so
  `seed_generator` and `seed_critic` sub-agents can call
  `arxiv_search`, `paper_fetch_arxiv`, and `geode_seed_pool_search`
  themselves вҖ” LLM-autonomous grounding rather than pre-fetch into
  PipelineState. The Generator's `.claude/agents/seed_generator.md`
  prompt now defines a 2-step **Grounding step** (intra-corpus seed
  search вҶ’ optional arXiv lookup) before drafting; the seed
  frontmatter contract advertises an optional `references: [<arxiv_id>,
  ...]` field for provenance. The Critic's prompt picks one arXiv id
  to spot-check via `paper_fetch_arxiv` and flags `judge_risk` when
  the abstract doesn't actually describe the claimed behavior. The
  Evolver contract explicitly preserves `references:` across
  rewrites (the field is a provenance signal, not an editable body
  section). The remaining 5 seed toolkits (pilot / ranker / proximity
  / evolver / meta_review) stay unchanged вҖ” CSP-3 scope is the two
  authoring roles only.

- **Literature-grounding tools вҖ” `arxiv_search` / `paper_fetch_arxiv` /
  `geode_seed_pool_search` (CSP-2)** вҖ” Three new native tools wired into
  `core/tools/definitions.json` + the `_DELEGATED_TOOLS` registry. arXiv
  search hits the public `export.arxiv.org/api/query` endpoint (no auth,
  ~3s rate-limit with single-connection-at-a-time per arXiv ToU,
  enforced by a process-global lock spanning both wait + HTTP request)
  and parses the Atom feed into structured per-paper records;
  `paper_fetch_arxiv` retrieves one paper by id with format/version
  normalisation. `geode_seed_pool_search` does token-set-intersection
  ranking (with frontmatter +2 boost) over the bundled Petri seed
  corpus (`plugins/petri_audit/seeds`, `seeds_gen1`) plus the runtime
  `~/.geode/self-improving-loop/latest_seed_pool/` symlink, filtering
  out non-seed markdown (`README.md` etc.) via a seed-shaped-frontmatter
  heuristic. All three tools expose an async `aexecute` entry point so
  the `_safe_delegate` worker path can invoke them; both tools clamp
  `max_results` to `[1, 20]` (JSON-schema-mirrored). New
  `literature_research` toolkit in `toolkits.toml` composes these three
  with `common_read`; no agent is migrated to it yet (pinned by test)
  so the system_prompt update is an explicit follow-up decision.
  Domain-shifted replacement for the co-scientist port's PubMed/INDRA
  path вҖ” GEODE's grounding sources are alignment / interpretability /
  LLM-safety papers + the internal seed corpus, not biology.
- **Toolkit-based sub-agent tool resolution (CSP-1)** вҖ” Sub-agent
  AgentDefinitions can now declare a named `toolkit:` in their
  frontmatter that the worker resolves against
  `core/tools/toolkits.toml` at spawn time, replacing the per-agent
  flat `tools:` list. Toolkits compose via `includes:` (Hermes-style)
  and fail closed to a `_default` safety net when undeclared or
  typo'd. The model-visible tool schemas are filtered to match the
  executor's allowlist so denied tools are not advertised to the LLM.
  Backwards compatible вҖ” legacy `tools:` frontmatter still works when
  no toolkit is named. The 7 seed-generation AgentDefs
  (`.claude/agents/seed_*.md`) are migrated to the new key.
  Frontier prior art: LangChain Toolkit, Hermes toolsets,
  open-coscientist workflow whitelist.
- **General-purpose toolkits + default agent migration (CSP-1)** вҖ”
  `core/tools/toolkits.toml` ships three domain-neutral toolkits
  (`web_research`, `data_analysis`, `general_purpose`) so any agent
  can declare `toolkit: web_research` without re-listing tools. The
  bundled `_DEFAULT_AGENTS` (research_assistant / data_analyst /
  web_researcher) are migrated from flat `tools:` lists to toolkit
  declarations; the migration also corrects the pre-CSP-1
  `"web_search"` reference (which never resolved to a real handler)
  to the canonical `general_web_search` via the `web_research`
  toolkit.

### Fixed

- **PR-OL-AUDIT-BURST-FIX вҖ” autoresearch audit к°Җ OAuth subscription мң„м—җм„ң
  мӢӨм ң мҷ„лЈҢ (FIX-1/2/3, paperclip burst pattern л§Өм№ӯ).**
  Pattern B subscription routing лҸ„мһ… нӣ„ мІ« real audit мӢңлҸ„ 17 л¶„ timeout +
  0 sample мҷ„лЈҢ. trace м¶”м Ғ кІ°кіј inspect_ai к°Җ `DEFAULT_MAX_CONNECTIONS = 10`
  (.venv/.../inspect_ai/_util/constants.py:9) мңјлЎң auditor + judge + target
  3 provider к°Ғк°Ғ 10 concurrent = **мөңлҢҖ 30 inflight** л°ңмӮ¬. Anthropic Max
  OAuth tier мқҳ "interactive coding" soft limit (~5 req/sec) мқҳ 6л°° вҶ’
  мҰүмӢң 429 вҶ’ exponential backoff (л§Ҳм§Җл§ү retry 769мҙҲ лҢҖкё°) вҶ’ timeout.
  **Paperclip GAP audit**: paperclip мқҙ single Anthropic account лЎң multi-
  agent мҡҙмҳҒн•ҙлҸ„ 429 м•Ҳ л§ҢлӮҳлҠ” мқҙмң лҠ” (1) agent вүЎ subprocess (process
  boundary), (2) agent лӮҙл¶Җ turn-by-turn serial (1 inflight/agent), (3)
  active agent мҲҳ ~2-5 вҶ’ лҲ„м Ғ ~5 req/sec, (4) invoke-dedup 5-sec window
  + circuit-breaker к°Җ burst м¶”к°Җ м°ЁлӢЁ. GEODE audit лҠ” (1)-(4) лӘЁл‘җ м—Ҷмқҙ
  inspect_ai default к°Җ мҰүмӢң burst вҶ’ нҷҳкІҪ л¶Ҳмқјм№ҳ. **3 fix**:
  - **FIX-1** `plugins/petri_audit/runner.py::build_command` (мӢӨм ң
    `inspect eval` argv assembly м§Җм җ) м—җ `--max-connections 1` м¶”к°Җ вҖ”
    inspect_ai per-provider connection pool 10 вҶ’ 1. Codex MCP fix-up:
    мҙҲкё°м—” `autoresearch/train.py::_build_audit_command` м—җ м¶”к°Җн–ҲмңјлӮҳ
    `geode audit` Typer wrapper к°Җ unknown option мңјлЎң reject вҶ’ н•ң layer
    м•„лһҳлЎң мқҙлҸҷ.
  - **FIX-2** к°ҷмқҖ `build_command` м—җ `--max-samples 1` вҖ” per-sample
    parallelism лҸ„ м§Ғл ¬нҷ”.
  - **FIX-3** мӢ к·ң `core/llm/audit_lane.py` (module-level `Lane(max_
    concurrent=1, timeout_s=900)`, `core.orchestration.lane_queue.Lane`
    мһ¬мӮ¬мҡ©) + `run_audit` мқҳ `subprocess.run` мқ„ `with acquire_audit_lane
    (session_id):` лЎң к°җмӢём„ң inter-process м§Ғл ¬нҷ” (cron + manual м¶©лҸҢ м°ЁлӢЁ).
    LaneQueue container к°Җ standalone CLI мӢӨн–үмӢңм—” build м•Ҳ лҗҳлҜҖлЎң module-
    level singleton нҢЁн„ҙ мұ„нғқ.
  Lane timeout (900s) лҸ„лӢ¬ мӢң `audit_lane_timeout` journal event л°ңнҷ” +
  `RuntimeError("audit lane busy beyond timeout: вҖҰ")` raise. Codex MCP
  fix-up: lazy init м—җ `threading.Lock` (double-checked locking) м¶”к°Җ вҖ”
  л‘җ thread к°Җ лҸҷмӢң first-call мӢң distinct Lane instance л°ңкёүлҗҳлҠ” race
  м°ЁлӢЁ. **10 invariant test** (`tests/test_ol_audit_burst_fix.py`) вҖ” argv
  4 (max-connections / max-samples / мҲңм„ң / outer `geode audit` argv
  м—җлҠ” м•Ҳ л“Өм–ҙк°Җм•ј н•Ё) + lane 6 (singleton м•Ҳм •м„ұ / capacity / sequential
  м§Ғл ¬нҷ” / лҸҷмӢң acquire blocking мӢңк°„ мёЎм • / 8-thread lazy-init race
  thread-safety / source-level integration grep). Quality gates clean
  (ruff + ruff format --check + mypy + 10/10 pytest). Cost: audit wall
  time лҠҳм–ҙлӮЁ (10x parallel вҶ’ serial). кұ°лһҳ к°Җм№ҳ: 429 storm zero + мӢӨм ң
  sample мҷ„лЈҢ. multi-account AccountPool лҸ„мһ…мӢң lane capacity knob мңјлЎң
  ramp к°ҖлҠҘ.


- **PR-OL-OAUTH-COUNT-TOKENS вҖ” Claude OAuth count_tokens 401 fallback.**
  Pattern-B subscription-routed Petri audit (Claude Max OAuth, OL-A2-data
  + OL-P1 unblock path) was aborting before any sample ran with
  `AuthenticationError 401 invalid x-api-key` on
  `/v1/messages/count_tokens`. Root cause: Claude OAuth tokens carry
  scope `user:inference` вҖ” Anthropic gateway accepts for `/v1/messages`
  but rejects for `/v1/messages/count_tokens`. inspect_ai's class-method
  `count_tokens` (`AnthropicAPI` line 532+) propagates the 401 with no
  try/except вҶ’ `Task interrupted (no samples completed)`. **Fix**:
  override `count_tokens` in `plugins/petri_audit/claude_code_provider.py
  ::ClaudeOAuthAPI` to skip the API call and return inspect_ai's own
  documented fallback heuristic (`max(1, len(text) // 4)`). Heuristic
  extracted to module-level pure function `estimate_tokens_for_oauth(input)`
  so it is testable without instantiating the inspect_ai-wrapped class.
  Accuracy degrades from "exact" to "Anthropic-standard heuristic" вҖ”
  operators needing exact pre-flight cost numbers should use PAYG path
  (`api_key` source). **9 invariant test** (`tests/test_ol_oauth_count_tokens_fallback.py`)
  вҖ” string/empty/None input + list-of-msg with str-content + list-of-msg
  with block-content (tool_use shape) + mixed shapes + skip-non-text-blocks
  + source-level pin on override+delegation + inspect_ai-gated class
  presence check. Quality gates clean (ruff + ruff format --check + mypy
  + 9/9 pytest).

## [0.99.28] - 2026-05-22

> Tier 1 (Outer Loop) closure stamp. 2 PRs:
> OL-A3 (#1451) `geode outer-bundle` viewer + OL-P2 (#1452) Petri quota
> actual enforcement. Tier 1 *coding* slices are now 100% closed вҖ” all
> remaining items (OL-A2-data / OL-P1) blocked by Anthropic credit;
> OL-C3.2 ADR-gated (selection policy / cost ceiling / disk cap).

### Added

- **PR-OL-P2 вҖ” Petri quota actual enforcement (auto-trip + opt-in call gate).**
  Pre-OL-P2 мқҳ `SubscriptionQuotaBanner.abort_threshold` к°Җ *display-only*
  вҖ” `tier()` к°Җ red л°ҳнҷҳ вҶ’ мӢңк°Ғл§Ң л№Ёк°ңм§Җм§Җл§Ң мӢӨм ң abort лҠ” credential
  resolver мқҳ strict-mode л§Ң л°ңнҷ”. мһҗм—° usage к°Җ threshold лҘј л„ҳм–ҙлҸ„
  enforcement м—ҶмқҢ. **мӢ к·ң 2 wiring**: (1) `set_state` к°Җ мғҲ ratio к°Җ
  `abort_threshold` лҘј cross н•ҳл©ҙ мһҗлҸҷмңјлЎң `aborted=True` + м •ліҙм„ұ
  `abort_reason` мұ„мӣҖ. мқҙлҜё abort лҗң мғҒнғңл©ҙ кё°мЎҙ reason ліҙмЎҙ (credential
  issue к°Җ usage issue ліҙлӢӨ мҡ°м„  мӢ нҳё). `clear_abort` нӣ„ лӢӨмӢң breach н•ҳл©ҙ
  мһ¬-trip. (2) **`enforce_or_raise()` мӢ к·ң л©”м„ңл“ң** вҖ” `QuotaAbortError`
  (RuntimeError н•ҳмң„) лҘј banner aborted мғҒнғңмқј л•Ң raise. мҡҙмҳҒмһҗк°Җ нҳём¶ң
  м§Җм җм—җ opt-in мңјлЎң wrapping вҶ’ fail-fast. **мӢ к·ң example caller**:
  `autoresearch/train.py::run_audit(dry_run=False)` к°Җ `_build_audit_command`
  м§Ғм „м—җ `current_banner() and current_banner().enforce_or_raise()` нҳём¶ң
  вҶ’ quota к°Җ trip лҗҳл©ҙ audit subprocess мһҗмІҙлҘј spawn м•Ҳ н•Ё (к°ҖмһҘ л№„мӢј
  caller мқҙлҜҖлЎң first wiring). кё°мЎҙ caller л“ӨмқҖ unchanged (backwards-compat
  preserved). **мӢ к·ң export**: `QuotaAbortError` м¶”к°Җ, `__all__` к°ұмӢ .
  **кё°мЎҙ test 1 к°ң к°ұмӢ ** (`test_render_red_when_at_abort_threshold` к°Җ
  pre-OL-P2 мқҳ "95% used" м¶ңл Ҙ лҢҖмӢ  мғҲ "aborted" м¶ңл Ҙ кІҖмҰқ). **12 мӢ к·ң
  invariant test** (`tests/test_ol_p2_quota_enforcement.py`) вҖ” auto-trip
  x6 + enforce_or_raise x4 + autoresearch wiring x2. Quality gates clean
  (ruff + ruff format --check + mypy + 12/12 OL-P2 + 69 regression on
  adjacent quota tests).

- **PR-OL-A3 вҖ” `geode outer-bundle` viewer (Tier 1 closure).**
  OL-A1.5 (#1446) к°Җ `auto_trigger_history.jsonl` мқ„ мӢ к·ң мӮ°м¶ңн•ҳл©ҙм„ң
  outer-loop к°Җ л§Ңл“ңлҠ” 3 streams (`auto_trigger_history.jsonl` /
  `mutations.jsonl` / `baseline.json`) к°Җ лӘЁл‘җ л§ӨкІЁмЎҢлҠ”лҚ°, мҡҙмҳҒмһҗк°Җ м…Ӣ
  мӨ‘ м–ҙлҠҗ нҢҢмқјмқ„ grep н•ҙм•ј н• м§Җ лӘЁлҘҙлҠ” surface gap мһ”мЎҙ вҖ” ліё PR к°Җ
  closure. **мӢ к·ң лӘЁл“Ҳ** `core/cli/outer_bundle.py` (~280 LOC) вҖ” Typer
  command `geode outer-bundle [--limit N] [--json]` к°Җ 3 source лҘј
  chronologically merge вҶ’ Rich table (default) лҳҗлҠ” JSONL (--json) м¶ңл Ҙ.
  `BundleEvent` dataclass (`ts: float`, `source: str`, `detail: str`)
  + `load_bundle_events()` public loader + `_parse_iso_or_epoch` (float/
  ISO-8601 dual-format) + `_tail_jsonl` (graceful partial-line skip).
  Source discriminator 3-к°’: `auto_trigger` / `mutation` / `baseline`
  (л§Ҳм§Җл§үмқҖ synthetic 1-row from current promoted baseline.json). лҲ„лқҪ
  нҢҢмқј вҶ’ empty bundle (raise м—ҶмқҢ). **CLI л“ұлЎқ**: `core/cli/__init__.py`
  мқҳ `app.command(name="outer-bundle")` лЎң entry point. **15 invariant
  test** (`tests/test_ol_a3_outer_bundle.py`) вҖ” BundleEvent round-trip
  + parse helpers x3 (float / ISO / garbage) + _tail_jsonl x3 (last-N /
  malformed skip / missing path) + load_bundle_events x5 (auto-trigger
  only / mutation row / baseline synthetic / 3-source chronological
  sort / all-missing empty) + CLI x3 (Typer registration / no-data
  callable / --json output). Quality gates clean (ruff + ruff format
  --check + mypy + 15/15 pytest). CLI smoke (`geode outer-bundle
  --help`) renders.

## [0.99.27] - 2026-05-22

> 51 PRs accumulated since v0.99.26. Headline arcs:
>
> - **Self-improving Outer Loop sprint 1** (8 PR, this session) вҖ”
>   deception closure (OL-C1/C2/C3) + auto-trigger (OL-A1/A1.5) +
>   drift-prevention pins (OL-G/C2') + CB-FLAKE flake cleanup.
> - **Hermes absorption Phase 1** вҖ” FTS5 + нҠёлҰ¬к·ёлһЁ indexer (Hermes-1c)
>   + `session_search` LLM tool (Hermes-1d).
> - **M-sprint in-context wiring** вҖ” M1-M4.4.3 (skill / agent contract /
>   few-shot pool / DPO publisher trilogy / 4-slot reader trilogy).
> - **PAPERCLIP** вҖ” subscription billing pattern for self-improving
>   loop mutator (`claude-cli` / `openai-codex` subprocess dispatch).
> - **S3-S6 + T6** вҖ” 4м¶• baseline.json ratchet + heuristic indicators
>   JSON mutation surface.

### Added

- **PR-OL-C2' вҖ” Reflection node canonical-path pins (drift prevention).**
  Roadmap (2026-05-22) мқҳ OL-C2' к°Җ `core/agent/reflection.py` мӢ к·ң лӘЁл“Ҳмқ„
  мҡ”кө¬н–ҲмңјлӮҳ GAP audit кІ°кіј reflection node к°Җ **мқҙлҜё** `core/agent/loop/
  _reflection.py` (321 LOC, PR-3 C-2 cognitive-loop-uplift) м—җ мЎҙмһ¬ + 3 к°ңмқҳ
  test file (`tests/test_reflection_node.py` / `test_reflection_cost_gate.py`
  / `test_s0b_reflection_reader.py`) к°Җ м»ӨлІ„. ліё PR к°Җ OL-G нҢЁн„ҙ м°Ёмҡ© вҖ”
  4 к°ңмқҳ drift-prevention invariant pin м¶”к°Җ. (1) canonical path к°Җ
  `core/agent/loop/_reflection.py` мһ„мқ„ лӘ» л°•мқҢ. (2) parallel duplicate к°Җ
  `core/agent/reflection.py` м—җ мғқкё°м§Җ лӘ»н•ҳкІҢ anti-presence assert (мҡҙмҳҒмһҗк°Җ
  stale roadmap ліҙкі  мһ¬кө¬нҳ„ мӢңлҸ„н•ҳл©ҙ RED). (3) load-bearing surface
  (`reflect_async` / `REFLECTION_TOOL_NAME = "record_reflection"` /
  `_REFLECTION_TOOL` schema мқҳ hypotheses/confidence/next_action_hint
  3 н•„л“ң) л…ём¶ң кІҖмҰқ. (4) `HookEvent.COGNITIVE_REFLECT` enum entry +
  value л§Өм№ҳ. **мӮ¬мқҙл“ң л…ёнҠё**: `core/agent/reflection_policy.py` (S0a-

  лҠ” *лі„к°ң лӘЁл“Ҳ* вҖ” к°ҷмқҖ л””л үнҶ лҰ¬м—җ кіөмЎҙ н—Ҳмҡ© (м—ӯн•  л¶„лҰ¬: policy reader
  vs reflection-node implementation). 4/4 pytest pass, ruff + ruff

- **PR-OL-G вҖ” Config drift invariant pins (G-B / G-D / G-E).**

  - **G-B**: `AutoresearchConfig.target_model` / `judge_model` н•„л“ң +

- **PR-OL-A1.5 вҖ” auto-trigger telemetry events + JSONL audit log.**
  PR-OL-A1 (#1445) к°Җ cron-driven mutator firing мқ„ лҸ„мһ…н•ҳл©ҙм„ң `state`
  к°’мқ„ INFO log лЎңл§Ң м¶ңл Ҙ вҖ” Petri/Inspect viewer к°ҷмқҖ лӢӨмҡҙмҠӨнҠёлҰјмқҙ
  м„ём…ҳмқ„ нҶөкі„лЎң к·ёлҰҙ мҲҳ м—ҶлҠ” deception мһ”мЎҙ. ліё PR к°Җ лӢ«кё°. **HookEvent
  5мў… м¶”к°Җ** (`core/hooks/system.py`) вҖ” `SELF_IMPROVING_AUTO_TRIGGER_{FIRED,
  LOCK_BUSY, INTERVAL_BLOCKED, RUNNER_ERROR, PARSE_ERROR}` лЎң к°Ғ terminal
  state 1:1 л§Өн•‘. `disabled` лҠ” мқҳлҸ„м ҒмңјлЎң enum лҜёнҸ¬н•Ё (мҡҙмҳҒмһҗк°Җ лӘ…мӢңм Ғ
  off вҶ’ л§Ө cron tick л§ҲлӢӨ л¬ҙмқҳлҜё event л°ңмғқ л°©м§Җ, wiring мқҳ startup log
  к°Җ SoT). л§Өн•‘ н…Ңмқҙлё” `STATE_TO_HOOK_EVENT` л…ём¶ң вҖ” runtime resolution
  мқҖ `getattr(HookEvent, name)`. **JSONL audit log** мӢ к·ң writer
  `append_history_entry(*, state, detail, ts, trigger_id, history_path)`
  к°Җ `~/.geode/self-improving-loop/auto_trigger_history.jsonl` м—җ append-
  only н•ң мӨ„лӢ№ `{ts, state, detail, trigger_id}`. `ensure_ascii=False` лЎң
  н•ңкёҖ detail (`м„№м…ҳ=н•ңкёҖ`) ліҙмЎҙ. `mkdir + write_text` лӢЁмқј try (PR-OL-C2
  Codex MCP lesson). OSError мӢң `False` л°ҳнҷҳ + WARNING log вҖ” telemetry
  мӢӨнҢЁк°Җ state machine мҳҒн–Ҙ лӘ» мӨҢ. Path лҠ” ``~/.geode/`` н•ҳмң„ вҖ” л ҲнҸ¬
  мҷёл¶Җ, gitignore N/A (PR-G5b #1350 "git-tracked but isn't" мӮ¬лЎҖ нҡҢн”ј).
  **`auto_trigger_mutator` лҰ¬нҢ©нҶ л§Ғ** вҖ” л§Ө `return AutoTriggerStatus(...)`
  лҘј `_finalize_status` helper лЎң лӢЁмқј м¶ңкө¬м җ нҶөкіј: hook emit + history
  append + status л°ҳнҷҳ 3к°Җм§Җ л¶ҖмҲҳнҡЁкіјк°Җ drift м—Ҷмқҙ к°ҷмқҖ л¶„кё°м—җм„ң fire.
  `hooks: Any = None` кё°ліёк°’ вҖ” REPL/CLI м§Ғм ‘ нҳём¶ң graceful (telemetry
  sink м—Ҷм–ҙлҸ„ мһ‘лҸҷ). `_BrokenHooks` мӢңл®¬л Ҳмқҙм…ҳ test лЎң hook handler
  raise к°Җ state machine crash лӘ» мӢңнӮЁлӢӨлҠ” invariant кІҖмҰқ. **wiring**:
  `core/wiring/automation.py::build_automation` мқҳ `register_auto_trigger`
  нҳём¶ңм—җ `hooks=hooks` мқёмһҗ м¶”к°Җ вҖ” daemon мқҳ HookSystem instance к°Җ
  callback closure лЎң мәЎміҗлҸј cron fire л§ҲлӢӨ мһҗлҸҷ emit. **17 invariant test**
  (`tests/test_ol_a15_telemetry.py`) вҖ” HookEvent enum x3 (5 variant value /
  STATE_TO_HOOK_EVENT 5-state coverage + disabled л¶Җмһ¬ / getattr resolve)
  + append_history_entry x5 (1 row write / multi-append / parent dir мғқм„ұ
  / Unicode preserve / OSError graceful) + auto_trigger_mutator end-to-end
  x9 (fired/lock_busy/interval_blocked/runner_error/parse_error к°Ғк°Ғ hook+
  history л°ңмғқ / disabled к°Җ hook+history л‘ҳ лӢӨ skip / hooks=None graceful /
  multi-call append-only / hook handler raise кІ©лҰ¬). Quality gates clean
  (ruff + format-check + mypy + 43/43 pytest лҲ„м Ғ OL-A1+A1.5).

- **PR-OL-A1 вҖ” self-improving loop mutator auto-trigger (cron + 4-backend grounded).**
  Pre-OL-A1 мқҳ `SelfImprovingLoopRunner` лҠ” *manual* л°ңнҷ”л§Ң м§Җмӣҗ (operator
  к°Җ `geode self-improve mutate` нҳём¶ң, нҳ№мқҖ autoresearch sprint runner
  м•Ҳм—җм„ң sync invoke). OL-A1 к°Җ GEODE daemon scheduler мң„м—җ cron-к°ҖлҠҘн•ң
  auto-trigger лҘј м–№м–ҙ operator л¶Җмһ¬ мғҒнғңм—җм„ңлҸ„ wrapper-prompt / м •мұ…
  м§„нҷ”к°Җ кі„мҶҚлҗҳкІҢ н•Ё. **мӢ к·ң лӘЁл“Ҳ** `core/self_improving_loop/auto_trigger.py`
  вҖ” pure мң нӢё `auto_trigger_mutator(*, enabled, min_interval_minutes,
  runner_factory=None, lock_path=None, timestamp_path=None, now=None)`
  к°Җ 6 terminal state мӨ‘ н•ҳлӮҳ (`fired` / `lock_busy` /
  `interval_blocked` / `runner_error` / `parse_error` / `disabled`) мқҳ
  `AutoTriggerStatus` dataclass л°ҳнҷҳ. л°ңнҷ” мӨ‘ л°ңмғқ к°ҖлҠҘн•ң лӘЁл“  мҳҲмҷё
  (factory raise / runner __init__ raise / `run_once()` raise)лҠ” try/except
  лЎң мһЎнҳҖ `runner_error` лҳҗлҠ” `parse_error` state лЎң нҷҳмӣҗ вҖ” scheduler loop
  crash л°©м§Җ (Codex MCP fix-up). **2-layer лҸҷмӢңм„ұ к°Җл“ң**: (1) `fcntl.flock`
  LOCK_EX | LOCK_NB advisory lock (`~/.geode/self-improving-loop/auto_trigger.lock`)
  вҖ” л‘җ cron-fire нҳ№мқҖ cron + manual `geode self-improve mutate` race м°ЁлӢЁ,
  kernel crash мӢң мһҗлҸҷ н•ҙм ң. (2) `min_interval_minutes` нғҖмһ„мҠӨнғ¬н”„ кІҢмқҙнҠё
  (`auto_trigger_last_run.txt`) вҖ” clock-skew / restart re-fire нқЎмҲҳ. кІҢмқҙнҠёлҠ”
  lock нҡҚл“қ *м „нӣ„* лӘЁл‘җ нҸүк°Җ (TOCTOU л°©м–ҙ вҖ” Codex MCP fix-up). **4-backend
  source лқјмҡ°нҢ… кІҖмҰқ**: wrapper к°Җ мһҗмІҙ source vocabulary лҘј к°Җм§Җм§Җ м•Ҡкі 
  `SelfImprovingLoopRunner.run_once()` м—җ dispatch. Runner лҠ” PR-PAPERCLIP
  (#1433) мқҳ `[self_improving_loop.mutator].source` 4-enum (`auto` /
  `api_key` / `claude-cli` / `openai-codex`) мқ„ мқҙлҜё honour. Dispatch
  topology лҠ” *л‘җ кІҪлЎң*: (a) `claude-cli` / `openai-codex` лҠ”
  `core/self_improving_loop/cli_subprocess.py` мқҳ subprocess лЎң лқјмҡ°нҢ…
  (Claude Code Max / ChatGPT Plus subscription мІӯкө¬ вҖ” `_ADAPTER_MAP` мҡ°нҡҢ),
  (b) `auto` / `api_key` лҠ” `core/llm/adapters.py::_ADAPTER_MAP` мқҳ 3-provider
  (`anthropic` / `openai` / `glm`) + `openai-codex` м–ҙлҢ‘н„° кІҪмң . мҙқ 4 backend
  (Claude Code subscription / Codex CLI subscription / Anthropic PAYG / OpenAI
  PAYG) лӘЁл‘җ м¶”к°Җ мҪ”л“ң м—Ҷмқҙ мһ‘лҸҷ.
  **мӢ к·ң config** `[self_improving_loop.scheduler]` (`SchedulerConfig` in
  `core/config/self_improving_loop.py`) вҖ” `enabled: bool = False` (opt-in
  default), `cron: str = "0 */6 * * *"` (5-field cron, every 6 hours),
  `min_interval_minutes: Annotated[int, Field(ge=1, le=1440)] = 60`.
  Pydantic v2 `extra="forbid"` вҖ” мҳӨнғҖ мҡҙмҳҒмһҗк°Җ л°ңкІ¬ к°ҖлҠҘ. **Wiring** вҖ”
  `core/wiring/automation.py::build_automation` мқҳ scheduler_service.start
  м§Ғнӣ„м—җ `register_auto_trigger(trigger_manager, enabled, cron,
  min_interval_minutes)` нҳём¶ң. Default `enabled=False` мқҙл©ҙ `TriggerConfig`
  л“ұлЎқ мһҗмІҙлҘј кұҙл„ҲлңҖ вҖ” мҰү мҡҙмҳҒмһҗк°Җ `config.toml` м—җ `enabled = true` лӘ…мӢң
  м•Ҳ н•ҳл©ҙ *мҪ”л“ң path к°Җ dormant*. `try/except` лЎң wiring мҳӨлҘҳк°Җ startup
  block н•ҳм§Җ м•ҠкІҢ к°Җл“ң. **26 invariant test** (`tests/test_ol_a1_auto_trigger.py`)
  вҖ” SchedulerConfig defaults x4 (off / 6-hour cron / 60-min interval +
  range validation + extra forbid + top-level config carries scheduler) +
  lock semantics x3 (acquire fd / contention rejection / parent dir
  creation) + timestamp x3 (missing вҶ’ None / round-trip / unparseable вҶ’
  None) + min-interval x3 (no prior / recent blocks / old satisfies) +
  auto_trigger_mutator terminal states x9 (disabled / interval_blocked /
  lock_busy / fired / runner_error / parse_error / lock-released-after-
  raise / runner-factory-raises вҶ’ runner_error / post-lock interval re-check
  blocks fresh timestamp) + lazy runner import x1 + register_auto_trigger
  wiring x3 (disabled skip / enabled registers SCHEDULED TriggerConfig /
  closure forwards into `auto_trigger_mutator`). Quality gates clean (ruff +
  mypy + 26/26 pytest + 403 adjacent scheduler/wiring/trigger/automation
  regression). **Telemetry deferred** (`HookEvent.SELF_IMPROVING_AUTO_TRIGGER_*`
  + outer-loop bundle viewer) вҖ” OL-A2/OL-A3 scope.

- **PR-OL-C3 вҖ” `memory_recall` MD writer (close M4.4.1 reader's write-side).**
  M4.4.1 (#1436) к°Җ `core/self_improving_loop/memory_recall.load_memory_entries`
  + `in_context_wiring.py:123` лЎң reader л§Ң м¶ңмӢң вҶ’ мҡҙмҳҒмһҗк°Җ м§Ғм ‘ `.md`
  нҢҢмқјмқ„ мҶҗмңјлЎң мұ„мҡ°м§Җ м•ҠлҠ” н•ң `memory_recall` in-context slot мқҙ мҳҒкө¬
  empty list мң„м—җ ranking мһ‘лҸҷ (PR-OL-C2 мқҳ few-shot pool кіј лҸҷмқјн•ң
  reader-without-writer deception). **мӢ к·ң лӘЁл“Ҳ**
  `core/memory/recall_writer.py` вҖ” pure мң нӢё `write_recall_entry(*, name,
  description, body, type_label, recall_dir=None, overwrite=False)` к°Җ
  M4.4.1 frontmatter parser к°Җ кё°лҢҖн•ҳлҠ” м •нҷ•н•ң schema
  (`---\nname: вҖҰ\ndescription: вҖҰ\nmetadata:\n  type: вҖҰ\n---\n\n{body}\n`)
  лЎң н•ң мӨ„лӢ№ `.md` лҘј мһ‘м„ұ. `_slugify_name` мңјлЎң alnum+hyphen+underscore
  нҢҢмқјлӘ… ліҙмһҘ, `_escape_frontmatter_value` лЎң multi-line name/description/
  type_label лӢЁмқј лқјмқё к°•м ң (YAML-light parser мқҳ line-per-key к·ңм•Ҫ вҖ”
  type_label к№Ңм§Җ escape н•ҳлҠ” кұҙ Codex MCP fix-up нӣ„ м¶”к°Җ, frontmatter
  injection л°©м§Җ). `mkdir(parents=True,
  exist_ok=True)` + `write_text` лӢЁмқј try (Codex MCP PR-OL-C2 мқҳ mkdir-
  outside-try мӮ¬лЎҖ м Ғмҡ©). Idempotent вҖ” `overwrite=False` (default) к°Җ
  кё°мЎҙ мҠ¬лҹ¬к·ё нҢҢмқј ліҙмЎҙ, `True` мӢң лҢҖмІҙ. `resolve_recall_dir()` к°Җ
  `$GEODE_MEMORY_RECALL_DIR` мҡҙмҳҒмһҗ override > `~/.geode/memory/recall/`
  default вҖ” reader мҷҖ *к°ҷмқҖ* env var лҘј honour н•ҙм„ң мҡҙмҳҒмһҗк°Җ dir н•ң
  кііл§Ң мҳ®кё°л©ҙ read+write л‘ҳ лӢӨ л”°лқјмҳҙ. 4 canonical type мғҒмҲҳ
  (`RECALL_TYPE_{USER,FEEDBACK,PROJECT,REFERENCE}`) + `VALID_RECALL_TYPES`
  frozenset л…ём¶ң вҖ” Claude Code мқҳ auto-memory schema мҷҖ parity. Non-
  canonical type лҸ„ мһ‘м„ұ мһҗмІҙлҠ” н—Ҳмҡ© (DEBUG log) вҶ’ мҡҙмҳҒмһҗ лҸ„л©”мқё лі„
  custom type л§үм§Җ м•ҠмқҢ. **Auto-trigger л¶Җмһ¬ (мқҳлҸ„)** вҖ” `SESSION_ENDED`
  hook м—җм„ң мһҗлҸҷ л°ңнҷ” / LLM-curator лҠ” OL-C3.2 follow-up мңјлЎң deferred,
  к·јкұ°: (1) ADR л¶Җмһ¬ (every session мұ„нғқ? promoted-only? curator?),
  (2) cost ceiling лҜён•©мқҳ, (3) disk usage cap лҜён•©мқҳ. нҳ„мһ¬ entry-point
  мқҖ мҡҙмҳҒмһҗк°Җ CLI/REPL slash лЎң `write_recall_entry` м§Ғм ‘ нҳём¶ң. **17
  invariant test** (`tests/test_ol_c3_recall_writer.py`) вҖ” resolve x2
  (env override / кё°ліё path), slugify x3 (canonical / кіөл°ұ+punct /
  emptyвҶ’untitled), writer x7 (нҢҢмқј мғқм„ұ / M4.4.1 reader round-trip /
  idempotent skip / overwrite=True / multi-line frontmatter strip /
  parent dir мғқм„ұ / non-canonical type мһ‘м„ұ / type_label newline-escape
  injection л°©м§Җ), list x2 (м •л ¬ / м—ҶлҠ” dir empty), batch x2 (м „мІҙ мһ‘м„ұ
  / кё°мЎҙ slug skip). Reader-writer schema drift л°©м§Җмқҳ н•өмӢ¬мқҖ
  `test_write_round_trips_with_m4_4_1_reader` к°Җ *мӢӨм ң* reader лҘј import
  н•ҙм„ң лҸҷмқј нҢҢмқјмқ„ parsing вҖ” н•ң мӘҪмқҙ schema ліҖкІҪн•ҳл©ҙ мҰүмӢң RED. Quality
  gates clean (ruff + mypy + 17/17 pytest).

- **PR-OL-C2 вҖ” few-shot pool writer + autoresearch promote нҳём¶ңмһҗ.**
  M3 (#1426/#1428) мқҙ reader (`_load_few_shot_pool_override` +
  `apply_few_shot_pool`) л§Ң м¶ңмӢңн•ҳкі  writer л¶Җмһ¬лЎң exemplars in-context
  slot (M4.4 #1435) к°Җ мҳҒкө¬ empty pool мң„м—җ мһ‘лҸҷн–ҲлҚҳ deception н•ҙмҶҢ.
  **мӢ к·ң н•ЁмҲҳ** `core/llm/few_shot_pool.append_exemplar(user_msg,
  assistant_msg, fitness_delta, source, pool_path, max_size)` вҖ”
  16-hex SHA256 signature idempotent dedup + FIFO eviction
  (`MAX_EXEMPLAR_POOL_SIZE = 1000`). лӘЁл“Ҳ `__all__` м—җ
  `append_exemplar` + `MAX_EXEMPLAR_POOL_SIZE` л…ём¶ң. **autoresearch
  caller** вҖ” `autoresearch/train.py::main()` мқҳ OL-C1 eval emit м§Ғнӣ„
  `args.dry_run is False` AND `"true" in promoted_line.lower()` мӢң
  `append_exemplar(source="autoresearch_audit_promote", fitness_delta=
  fitness - mean(baseline_means))` нҳём¶ң (rejected pile мқҖ in-context
  exemplars мұ„л„җм—җ л“Өм–ҙк°Җм§Җ м•ҠкІҢ gate). м „мІҙ try/except лЎң к°җмӢём ё
  audit cycle ліҙнҳё. **mkdir + write_text лӘЁл‘җ лӢЁмқј try м•Ҳ** (Codex MCP
  FLAG fix вҖ” mkdir OSError лҸ„ graceful False л°ҳнҷҳ, raise м•Ҳ н•Ё).
  **14 invariant test** вҖ” signature x2 (determinism + field sensitivity)
  + writer x4 (one row / idempotent / multi-pair / round-trip with
  `_parse_jsonl`) + FIFO x2 (eviction at over-cap + cap constant
  exposed) + graceful x2 (parent dir creation + Unicode preserve) +
  train.py source кІҖмҰқ 4мў… (import мЎҙмһ¬ / promote gate /
  try/except wrap / OL-C1 emit нӣ„ мң„м№ҳ вҖ” order pin). **л©”нғҖ-level exemplar caveat**:
  audit cycle мқҳ `(prompt, response)` лҠ” meta-level вҖ” н–Ҙнӣ„ OL-C2.2
  follow-up м—җм„ң AgenticLoop-turn-level + Petri-per-turn writer м¶”к°Җ.

- **PR-OL-C1 вҖ” `eval_response_recorded` нҳём¶ңмһҗ wiring (autoresearch audit cycle лӢЁмң„).**
  M4.0 (#1429) мқҙ "deferred to caller wiring" мңјлЎң лӮЁкёҙ emit н•ЁмҲҳк°Җ
  л“ңл””м–ҙ production м—җ мІ« нҳём¶ңмһҗ нҡҚл“қ. `autoresearch/train.py::main()`
  мқҳ audit_finished journal emit м§Ғнӣ„ `emit_eval_response_recorded(...)`
  нҳём¶ң м¶”к°Җ. л§Ө audit cycle л§ҲлӢӨ 1 event мғқм„ұ вҖ” prompt = "audit cycle
  on commit X (seed_select=Y, description=Z)", response = "verdict=W
  fitness=F promoted=P dim_means_count=N", fitness_score = aggregate
  fitness, axis_scores = `{dim_means_aggregate, bench_means_aggregate}`,
  source = `"autoresearch_audit"`, **rollback_flag = `fitness == 0.0 OR
  verdict.lower() in {"reject", "regression"}`** (chosen pile = м–‘нҳён•ң
  mutation, rejected pile = critical regression лҳҗлҠ” лӘ…мӢң reject).
  Emit м „мІҙк°Җ try/except лЎң к°җмӢём ё audit cycle мһҗмІҙлҠ” м ҲлҢҖ break м•Ҳ лҗЁ.
  Response payload лҠ” `verdict=<v> fitness=<f> promoted=<p>
  dim_means_count=<N> bench_means_count=<M>` 5 н•„л“ң. **DPO нҢҢмқҙн”„лқјмқё
  deception н•ҙмҶҢ** вҖ” M4.1 build_dpo_pack мқҳ journal walker к°Җ л“ңл””м–ҙ
  *non-empty* stream мқ„ мқҪмқҢ вҶ’ M4.2 publisher к°Җ мӢӨм ң TRL / OpenAI /
  Bedrock н•ҷмҠө лҚ°мқҙн„° мғқм„ұ к°ҖлҠҘ. к°ҷмқҖ commit л‘җ лІҲ audit мӢң
  chosen/rejected pair мһҗлҸҷ нҳ•м„ұ. **8 def / 14 runtime case invariant
  test** вҖ” chosen pile + rejected pile + no-scope no-op + train.py
  source кІҖмҰқ 4мў… (import мЎҙмһ¬ / main лӮҙл¶Җ / rollback heuristic м •нҷ• /
  try/except wrap) + rollback heuristic matrix 1 def Г— 7 parametrize.
  **OL-C1.2 (Petri per-turn emit) лҠ” нӣ„мҶҚ** вҖ” `.eval` log walker API
  к°Җ stable н•ң нӣ„ м§„мһ….

- **PR-Hermes-1d вҖ” `session_search` LLM tool (Hermes absorption Phase 1d, minimal).**
  Phase 1c (#1439) мқҳ FTS5 мқёлҚұмҠӨ мң„м—җ LLM-л…ём¶ң лҸ„кө¬ м¶”к°Җ. мӢ к·ң лӘЁл“Ҳ
  `core/tools/session_search.py` вҖ” `SessionSearchTool` мқҙ
  `SessionManager.search_messages` (1c мӢ м„Ө) нҳём¶ң, кІ°кіјлҘј `matched` /
  `count` / `hits[{session_id, message_id, seq, role, timestamp, snippet,
  score}]` нҳ•нғңлЎң л°ҳнҷҳ. **5 input field**: `query` (н•„мҲҳ, sanitizer нҶөкіј) +
  `session_id` (м„ нғқ вҖ” лӢЁмқј м„ём…ҳ scope) + `limit` (default 20, max 100
  clamp) + `prefer_trigram` (CJK / л¶Җл¶„ л¬ёмһҗм—ҙ recall). лҸ„кө¬лҠ”
  `core/wiring/container.py::build_default_registry` м—җ л“ұлЎқ +
  `core/tools/definitions.json` мқҳ `memory_search` м§Ғм „м—җ schema entry
  м¶”к°Җ. **мҡҙмҳҒмһҗ нқҗлҰ„**: л§Ө turn M4.4.1 мқҳ memory_recall мҠ¬лЎҜмқҙ
  *passive* лЎң `<memory-recall>` лё”лЎқ мЈјмһ…. agent к°Җ лҚ” кө¬мІҙм Ғмқё *active*
  recall мқҙ н•„мҡ”н•  л•Ң `session_search(query="DPO training",
  prefer_trigram=False)` м§Ғм ‘ нҳём¶ң к°ҖлҠҘ. л‘җ мұ„л„җ ліҙмҷ„ вҖ” passive лҠ” л§Ө
  turn мһҗлҸҷ, active лҠ” LLM мқҳлҸ„ лӘ…мӢңм Ғ. **Scope (1d-minimal)**: нҳ„мһ¬
  н”„лЎңм қнҠё `sessions.db` л§Ң; cross-project (`global.db`) + async
  `SearchIndexer` thread + `geode reindex` CLI лҠ” PR-Hermes-1d.2 лЎң
  defer. **14 invariant test** вҖ” surface 2 (name + schema н•„мҲҳ н•„л“ң) +
  мһ…л Ҙ validation 3 (empty / whitespace / non-str query) + round-trip 1
  + scope filter 1 + trigram CJK recall 1 + empty DB no-hit 1 + limit 2
  (honored / clamped) + invalid limit fallback 1 + registry л“ұлЎқ 1 +
  definitions.json schema 1.

- **PR-Hermes-1c вҖ” FTS5 + нҠёлҰ¬к·ёлһЁ мқёлҚұмҠӨ (Hermes absorption Phase 1c).**
  Phase 1a (#1338) мқҳ messages н…Ңмқҙлё” + Phase 1b мқҳ SoT flip мң„м—җ full-text
  search мқёлҚұмҠӨ мӢ м„Ө. **мӢ к·ң лӘЁл“Ҳ** `core/storage/fts_helpers.py` вҖ”
  `sanitize_fts5_query` (Hermes `hermes_state.py:1796` нҢЁн„ҙ absorb вҖ” н•ҳмқҙн”Ҳ/
  лҸ„нҠё/мҪңлЎ  нҸ¬н•Ё нҶ нҒ°мқ„ double-quote escape, pure-meta нҶ нҒ° drop, Unicode
  letter bare мң м§Җ) + `has_trigram_support` (SQLite 3.34+ trigram tokenize
  capability probe; graceful False on `OperationalError`). **`session_manager.py`
  нҷ•мһҘ** вҖ” `__init__` к°Җ `messages_fts` (unicode61 tokenizer) мҷҖ 3 нҠёлҰ¬кұ°
  (insert/delete/update) лҘј н•ӯмғҒ мғқм„ұ, trigram к°ҖлҠҘ мӢң `messages_fts_trigram`
  + нҠёлҰ¬кұ° 3к°ң м¶”к°Җ (graceful degrade). нҠёлҰ¬кұ°лҠ” generator `_fts_trigger_block`
  мңјлЎң лӢЁмқј SoT вҖ” unicode/trigram л‘җ н…Ңмқҙлё” к°„ drift м°ЁлӢЁ. мӢ к·ң method
  `search_messages(query, session_id=, limit=, prefer_trigram=)` к°Җ sanitize вҶ’
  FTS5 `MATCH ?` мҝјлҰ¬ вҶ’ `bm25` м җмҲҳ + `snippet()` highlight л°ҳнҷҳ. **18
  invariant test** вҖ” sanitize 7к°ң (empty / bare alnum / hyphenated / dotted /
  internal quote escape / pure-meta drop / Unicode letter bare) + capability
  probe 2к°ң (modern OK / bad-conn graceful) + FTS schema 2к°ң (tables мғқм„ұ /
  triggers мғқм„ұ) + sync 4к°ң (insert вҶ’ index / round-trip search / session_id
  scope / hyphen query via sanitizer) + trigram 1к°ң (Korean л¶Җл¶„л¬ёмһҗм—ҙ
  recall) + delete cascade 1к°ң + empty query 1к°ң. 5 critical guarantees:
  default лҸҷмһ‘ byte-equal (кё°мЎҙ sessions/messages н–үмң„ лҜёліҖкІҪ вҖ” мӢ к·ң FTS
  table л§Ң м¶”к°Җ) / trigram м—ҶлҠ” SQLite л№Ңл“ңм—җм„ңлҸ„ graceful (unicode61 л§Ң
  нҷңм„ұ) / мҝјлҰ¬ мӮ°нӢ°нғҖмқҙм Җк°Җ FTS5 grammar мӮ¬кі  м°ЁлӢЁ / contentless FTS
  (`content='messages'`) лқј л””мҠӨнҒ¬ мӮ¬мҡ© мөңмҶҢ / нҠёлҰ¬кұ°к°Җ мқёлҚұмҠӨ мһҗлҸҷ
  лҸҷкё°нҷ” (operator мҲҳлҸҷ reindex л¶Ҳн•„мҡ”).

- **PR-M4.4.3 вҖ” `tool_hints` slot reader нҷңм„ұнҷ” + M4 sprint мў…лЈҢ (ADR-012).**
  M4.4 (#1435) мқҳ л§Ҳм§Җл§ү stub нҷңм„ұнҷ” вҖ” **лӘЁл“  4 in-context slot мқҙм ң
  мҷ„м „ wired**. мӢ к·ң лӘЁл“Ҳ `core/self_improving_loop/tool_hints.py` вҖ”
  `~/.geode/memory/episodes.jsonl` (episodic ledger, `core.memory.episodic.EpisodicStore`
  populates) лҘј `RECENT_WINDOW=200` лІ”мң„лЎң мқҪм–ҙ per-tool м§‘кі„ вҶ’
  `MIN_INVOCATIONS=3` + `FAIL_RATE_THRESHOLD=0.34` лҸҷмӢң нҶөкіј tool л§Ң
  surface вҶ’ `fail_rate desc, total desc` м •л ¬ вҶ’ top-K вҶ’ `<tool-hints>`
  block мңјлЎң system prompt м•һм—җ prepend. к°Ғ tool мқҳ *к°ҖмһҘ мөңк·ј*
  non-empty error мәЎміҗ (episodes к°Җ newest-first мқҙлқј dict мІ« м§„мһ…мқҙ
  recent), 80мһҗ + ellipsis trim. **Frontier signal**: `stuck_in_loops`
  / `redundant_tool_invocation` лқјлІЁмқҙ punish н•ҳлҠ” нҢЁн„ҙмқ„ *к·ё мһҗмІҙлЎң
  in-context prevention* вҖ” agent к°Җ "Bash к°Җ мөңк·ј 3лІҲ мӢӨнҢЁн–Ҳл„Ө" ліҙкі 
  лӢӨлҘё м „лһө м„ нғқ к°ҖлҠҘ. **Graceful** вҖ” `EpisodicStore` import мӢӨнҢЁ /
  ledger м—ҶмқҢ / read error / non-str tool_name лӘЁл‘җ silent skip.
  **18 invariant test** вҖ” `load_recent_episodes` x2 (store мӢӨнҢЁ /
  м„ұкіө) + `find_failing_tools` x8 (top_k=0 / min_invocations cap /
  fail_rate threshold / surface / most-recent-error мәЎміҗ / desc sort
  + tiebreak / top_k cap / non-str tool_name skip / 80-char trim) +
  `format_tool_hints_block` x3 (empty / with-error / without-error) +
  orchestrator x2 (block prepend / no-failing no-op). **M4 sprint
  мў…лЈҢ** вҖ” M4.0 (#1429 event) вҶ’ M4.1 (#1430 pack) вҶ’ M4.2 (#1431
  publisher) вҶ’ M4.3 (#1434 redaction/stats) вҶ’ M4.4 (#1435 orchestrator) вҶ’
  M4.4.1 (#1436 memory_recall) вҶ’ M4.4.2 (#1437 rubric_excerpts) вҶ’
  **M4.4.3 ліё PR (tool_hints + closure)**.

- **PR-M4.4.2 вҖ” `rubric_excerpts` slot reader нҷңм„ұнҷ” (ADR-012).**
  M4.4 (#1435) мқҳ л‘җ лІҲм§ё stub мҠ¬лЎҜ нҷңм„ұнҷ”. мӢ к·ң лӘЁл“Ҳ
  `core/self_improving_loop/rubric_excerpts.py` вҖ”
  `autoresearch/state/baseline.json` мқҪм–ҙ `dim_means` vs
  `baseline_means` м°Ёмқҙ кі„мӮ° вҶ’ `baseline_means[d] - dim_means[d] > 0`
  мқё dim л§Ң (regression positive) top-K desc м •л ¬ вҶ’ лӮҙмһҘ 17-dim
  `DIM_RUBRIC` мқҳ directive мҷҖ join вҶ’ `<rubric-warning>` лё”лЎқ render вҶ’
  orchestrator к°Җ system prompt м•һм—җ prepend. `DIM_RUBRIC` мқҖ 5
  critical + 12 auxiliary = 17к°ң fitness dim лӘЁл‘җ cover (н…ҢмҠӨнҠёк°Җ
  `autoresearch.train.AXIS_TIERS` мҷҖ лҸҷкё° кІҖмҰқ). **Graceful** вҖ” missing
  / malformed / non-dict baseline лӘЁл‘җ silent no-op. **Per-axis
  type-guard** вҖ” `dim_means[d]` к°Җ non-numeric мқҙл©ҙ к·ё dim л§Ң skip,
  лӮҳлЁём§ҖлҠ” нҶөкіј. **Frontier parity** вҖ” Claude Code мқҳ
  `<system-reminder>` + Codex CLI мқҳ `<important_reminders>` мҷҖ лҸҷмқј
  pattern. **17 invariant test** вҖ” `DIM_RUBRIC` 17 cover + лӘЁл“  entry
  non-empty + `load_baseline` x4 (missing / malformed / non-dict /
  valid) + `find_worst_regressions` x7 (top_k=0 / improving skip /
  desc sort / top_k cap / missing means / non-numeric skip / DIM_RUBRIC
  attach) + `format_rubric_block` x2 (empty / render with unknown-dim
  fallback) + orchestrator x2 (prepend / no-baseline no-op).
  **Remaining stub count after this PR: 1** (tool_hints only,
  M4.4.3 follow-up).

- **PR-M4.4.1 вҖ” `memory_recall` slot reader нҷңм„ұнҷ” (ADR-012).**
  M4.4 (#1435) мқҳ 4 мҠ¬лЎҜ мӨ‘ мІ« лІҲм§ё stub мқ„ нҷңм„ұнҷ”. мӢ к·ң лӘЁл“Ҳ
  `core/self_improving_loop/memory_recall.py` вҖ” frontmatter-style MD
  нҢҢмқј (Claude Code мқҳ auto-memory мҷҖ лҸҷмқј schema) мқ„
  `~/.geode/memory/recall/` (лҳҗлҠ” `GEODE_MEMORY_RECALL_DIR` env
  override) м—җм„ң walk вҶ’ `MemoryEntry(name, type, description, body,
  mtime)` лЎң parse вҶ’ `rank_memory_entries(entries, query, top_k)` к°Җ
  keyword overlap Г— recency_weight (`1 / (1 + age_days)`) лЎң м •л ¬ вҶ’
  `format_memory_block` мқҙ `<memory-recall>\n- [type] description\n
  ...\n</memory-recall>` лё”лЎқ render. **Orchestrator wiring** вҖ”
  `in_context_wiring.apply_in_context_slots` к°Җ `SLOT_MEMORY_RECALL`
  cfg л°ңкІ¬ мӢң мң„ 3лӢЁкі„ нҳём¶ң, кІ°кіј лё”лЎқмқ„ system prompt м•һм—җ
  prepend (per-slot try/except лЎң мӢӨнҢЁ мӢң graceful). `_latest_user_query`
  helper к°Җ messages мқҳ л§Ҳм§Җл§ү user-role string content м¶”м¶ң вҶ’ similarity
  ranking мқҳ query лЎң мӮ¬мҡ©. **Per-file graceful** вҖ” frontmatter лҲ„лқҪ /
  unreadable file / мһҳлӘ»лҗң YAML мқҖ silent skip. **No-op fast path**
  мң м§Җ вҖ” recall dir лҜёмЎҙмһ¬ мӢң `resolve_recall_dir()` к°Җ None л°ҳнҷҳ вҶ’
  reader к°Җ `[]` л°ҳнҷҳ вҶ’ orchestrator к°Җ system лҜёліҖкІҪ. **16 invariant
  test** вҖ” resolve x3 (env override / env-missing-graceful / default-missing) +
  load x3 (no-dir / frontmatter parse / malformed skip) + rank x4 (overlap /
  recency tiebreak / top_k=0 / top_k cap) + format x4 (empty / type-tag
  render / **description-only with empty body** / **body-only fallback** вҖ”
  Codex MCP к°Җ мһЎмқҖ ternary precedence regression) + orchestrator нҶөн•© x2
  (block prepend / no-dir no-op).

- **PR-M4.4 вҖ” In-context slot wiring orchestrator + provider wiring (ADR-012).**
  M4 DPO pipeline мқҳ closing piece вҖ” S5 (#1425) мқҳ 4-slot schema мҷҖ M3
  (#1426/#1428) мқҳ few-shot pool substrate лҘј мӢӨм ң inference path м—җ
  м—°кІ°. **мӢ к·ң лӘЁл“Ҳ** `core/self_improving_loop/in_context_wiring.py`
  мқҳ `apply_in_context_slots(messages, system="")` orchestrator вҖ”
  S5 `_load_in_context_slots_override()` к°Җ None мқҙл©ҙ input к°қмІҙ
  **identity** л°ҳнҷҳ (zero-allocation no-op fast path; default GEODE
  operator лҠ” м¶”к°Җ л№„мҡ© 0). slot нҷңм„ұ мӢң per-slot try/except лЎң к°Ғ
  reader/apply к°Җ лҸ…лҰҪ graceful. **exemplars мҠ¬лЎҜ = мӢӨм ң нҷңм„ұ** вҖ”
  M3 мқҳ `_load_few_shot_pool_override` + `apply_few_shot_pool` мқ„
  нҳём¶ң, top-K (user, assistant) мҢҚмқ„ messages head м—җ prepend.
  fitness_delta desc rank. **memory_recall / rubric_excerpts /
  tool_hints 3 мҠ¬лЎҜ = лӘ…мӢңм Ғ stub at PR-M4.4 merge time** вҖ”
  orchestrator мқҙ SoT м—җм„ң к·ё мЎҙмһ¬лҘј мқёмӢқн•ҳм§Җл§Ң reader лҜёкө¬нҳ„мқҙлқј
  no-op; нӣ„мҶҚ PR к°Җ 1к°ңм”© нҷңм„ұнҷ” (PR-M4.4.1 #1436 вҶ’ memory_recall,
  PR-M4.4.2 вҶ’ rubric_excerpts; tool_hints л§Ң PR-M4.4.3 лҢҖкё°). **Provider
  wiring 2м§Җм җ** вҖ” `core/llm/providers/anthropic.py::ClaudeAgenticAdapter.agentic_call`
  + `core/llm/providers/openai.py::OpenAIAgenticAdapter.agentic_call`
  мқҳ api-key/circuit-breaker мІҙнҒ¬ м§Ғнӣ„ orchestrator нҳём¶ң, кІ°кіјлЎң
  `(messages, system)` к°ұмӢ . л‘җ path лӘЁл‘җ inspect.getsource grep
  assertion мңјлЎң wiring ліҙмҰқ. **11 invariant test** вҖ” no-op
  identity 3 (no SoT / л№Ҳ dict / reader exception) + exemplars
  prepend 1 + exemplars л№Ҳ pool no-op + exemplars мӢӨнҢЁ graceful +
  system passthrough + 3 stub slot non-error + provider import
  smoke 2 + __all__ minimal export. ContextVar / hook лҜёмӮ¬мҡ© вҖ”
  л§Ө LLM call л§ҲлӢӨ ContextVar lookup н•ң лІҲлҸ„ м—ҶлҠ” stateless
  orchestrator. Frontier л№„көҗ: Claude Code system prompt /
  Codex CLI `<system-reminder>` мқҳ 4 layer wiring мқ„ mutator-target
  нҷ” н•ң explicit schema.

- **PR-M4.3 вҖ” DPO pack PII redaction + stats (ADR-012).**
  M4.1 canonical pack (`~/.geode/self-improving-loop/dpo/pack.jsonl`) к°Җ
  user prompts + assistant responses лҘј verbatim мңјлЎң к°Җм§ҖлҜҖлЎң M4.2
  publish м „ PII / secret мҠӨнҒ¬лҹҪмқҙ н•„мҲҳ. **мӢ к·ң лӘЁл“Ҳ**
  `core/self_improving_loop/dpo_redaction.py` вҖ” `redact_text(text)` к°Җ 7
  м№ҙн…Ңкі лҰ¬ нҢЁн„ҙ м Ғмҡ©: API key (Anthropic / OpenAI / Slack / GitHub /
  ZhipuAI вҖ” `core/utils/redaction.py` мқҳ кё°мЎҙ `_SECRET_PATTERNS` мһ¬нҷңмҡ©)
  + AWS access key (AKIA / ASIA) + Bearer token + Email + Phone (E.164 /
  dashed / parenthesised) + URL credentials (`https://u:p@host`) + POSIX
  home path (`/Users/<name>/` + `/home/<name>/`). `redact_pack_row(row)`
  к°Җ 5 н…ҚмҠӨнҠё н•„л“ң (`prompt` / `chosen` / `rejected` / `source_chosen` /
  `source_rejected`) л§Ң мҠӨнҒ¬лҹҪ, мҲ«мһҗ / signature н•„л“ңлҠ” passthrough.
  `redact_pack(src, dst) -> int` к°Җ read вҶ’ scrub вҶ’ write JSONL вҖ” missing
  src вҶ’ empty dst нҢҢмқј (graceful), malformed line silent drop, re-run
  byte-equal кІ°м •м„ұ ліҙмһҘ. **мӢ к·ң лӘЁл“Ҳ** `core/self_improving_loop/dpo_stats.py`
  вҖ” `pack_stats(path) -> dict` к°Җ pair_count / unique_prompts /
  fitness_delta {min,max,mean,median} / source_{chosen,rejected}_histogram
  л°ҳнҷҳ. missing / empty / all-malformed вҶ’ л№Ҳ dict (graceful).
  **redaction layer лҠ” нҡЁкіјм Ғ 7 м№ҙн…Ңкі лҰ¬** вҖ” API key лҠ” `redact_secrets`
  delegate мқҙлҜҖлЎң лӘЁл“Ҳмқҳ `PII_PATTERNS` table мһҗмІҙлҠ” 6 entry (URL
  cred / AWS / Bearer / Email / home / Phone) + 1 delegate. **19 + 8
  = 27 invariant test** вҖ” redaction 19 (нҢЁн„ҙлі„ 9 scrub + empty нҶөкіј +
  no-match unchanged + composed multi-secret + pattern table sanity +
  pack_row field-scope 2 + redact_pack 4) + stats 8 (missing / empty /
  malformed вҶ’ л№Ҳ dict + кё°ліё aggregate / unique_prompts / required
  field лҲ„лқҪ drop / int coerce / missing source histogram). ліё PR мқҖ
  ліҖнҷҳ + нҶөкі„л§Ң; M4.2 publisher мҷҖ н•©міҗм„ң мҡҙмҳҒмһҗк°Җ
  `redact_pack вҶ’ publish` нҢҢмқҙн”„лқјмқё мҲҳлҸҷ м—®м–ҙ мӮ¬мҡ©. CLI integration мқҖ
  M4.4 нӣ„мҶҚ.

- **PR-PAPERCLIP вҖ” Paperclip pattern wiring for self-improving loop mutator.**
  мӮ¬м „ PR (PR-1 G-A) к°Җ `MutatorConfig.source = Literal["auto", "api_key",
  "claude-cli", "openai-codex"]` knob л§Ң лҸ„мһ…н–Ҳкі  runner лҠ” source лҘј *лЎңк·ёл§Ң*
  м°Қм—ҲлӢӨ. ліё PR мқҙ мӢӨм ң dispatch лҘј м—°кІ°. **мӢ к·ң лӘЁл“Ҳ**
  `core/self_improving_loop/cli_subprocess.py` вҖ” `invoke_claude_cli` /
  `invoke_codex_cli` subprocess wrapper. `claude --print --output-format text
  --append-system-prompt <SYS> <USR>` / `codex exec --skip-git-repo-check
  <SYS+USR>` argv shape. binary path лҠ” `$PATH` мқҳ `claude`/`codex` лҳҗлҠ” env
  override (`GEODE_CLAUDE_CLI_BIN` / `GEODE_CODEX_CLI_BIN`). missing вҶ’
  `CliInvocationError` (м„Өм№ҳ hint лҸҷлҙү). 180s timeout. **runner ліҖкІҪ** вҖ”
  `_default_llm_call` к°Җ `cfg.mutator.source` кІҖмӮ¬ нӣ„ paperclip мқј л•Ң
  subprocess wrapper нҳём¶ң, else кё°мЎҙ API path мң м§Җ (zero-diff for default
  operators). **UI/UX** вҖ” `/self-improving config` (interactive м„Өм •м°Ҫ,
  mutator + petri.<role> + seed_generation.<role> м»ҙнҸ¬л„ҢнҠёлі„ provider /
  model / source мһ…л Ҙ, Enter лЎң нҳ„мһ¬к°’ мң м§Җ, мҷ„лЈҢ нӣ„ `/self-improving run`
  мІҙмқҙлӢқ мҳөм…ҳ вҖ” мһ…л Ҙ н•„л“ң *model + source*) + `/self-improving source`
  (нҳ„мһ¬ мғҒнғң н…Ңмқҙлё”) + `/self-improving source set <key>=<value>`
  (non-interactive mutator setter). **TOML м“°кё°** вҖ” `_splice_section`
  н—¬нҚјк°Җ `~/.geode/config.toml` мқҳ section header лҘј м°ҫм•„ in-place key
  к°ұмӢ , лҲ„лқҪ section мқҖ append, sibling section ліҙмЎҙ. seed-generation
  role м“°кё°лҠ” **plural `roles.<X>`** path мӮ¬мҡ© (loader schema мҷҖ лҸҷкё°
  вҖ” Codex MCP catch). `atomic_write_text` + `_toml_escape_basic_string`
  (кё°мЎҙ `cmd_config.py` нҢЁн„ҙ). **18 invariant test** вҖ” argv shape 2 /
  missing binary / env override / л№„м •мғҒ exit / **timeout** / runner
  dispatch 3 (claude-cli + codex + api_key л¬ҙліҖкІҪ) / TOML splice 5
  (append + replace + insert + sibling ліҙмЎҙ + мқҙмҠӨмјҖмқҙн”„) + source set
  3 + **seed-generation roles plural-path round-trip**
  (writer вҶ’ loader validate). мҳҒн–Ҙ лІ”мң„ вҖ” paperclip мқҖ self-improving
  loop **mutator only** (Q1 мқ‘лӢө). Agentic Loop мқјмғҒ нҳём¶ңмқҖ кё°мЎҙ API
  path к·ёлҢҖлЎң.

- **PR-M4.2 вҖ” DPO publisher adapters (TRL / OpenAI / Bedrock, ADR-012).**
  M4.1 canonical pack мқ„ per-provider DPO н•ҷмҠө мһ…л Ҙ нҸ¬л§·мңјлЎң ліҖнҷҳ.
  **мӢ к·ң лӘЁл“Ҳ** `core/self_improving_loop/dpo_publisher.py` вҖ” 3 adapter
  н•ЁмҲҳ (`to_trl_format` / `to_openai_format` / `to_bedrock_format`) +
  `publish_pack(target, pack_path, out_path) -> int` dispatcher. лӘЁл“ 
  ліҖнҷҳмқҖ **pure transform** вҖ” network call / SDK import / API key
  read мқјмІҙ м—ҶмқҢ. мҡҙмҳҒмһҗлҠ” кІ°кіј JSONL мқ„ provider мқҳ upload tool
  (`openai files create` / `aws s3 cp` / `hf datasets push`) м—җ м „лӢ¬.
  **Idempotency** вҖ” `publish_pack` к°Җ destination мқ„ л§ӨлІҲ overwrite
  н•ҳлҜҖлЎң лҸҷмқј (pack, target) мһ…л ҘмқҖ byte-equal output мғқм„ұ.
  **Adapter лі„ row schema**: TRL = мөңмҶҢ triple `{prompt, chosen,
  rejected}` (TRL DPOTrainer м§Ғм ‘ мҶҢл№„). OpenAI = messages мҠӨнғҖмқј
  `{input.messages, preferred_output, non_preferred_output}` (OpenAI
  preference fine-tuning guide мқҳ schema). Bedrock = generic
  passthrough `{prompt, chosen, rejected, signature, fitness_chosen,
  fitness_rejected, fitness_delta}` (base model family лі„ schema
  нҺём°Ёк°Җ м»Өм„ң мҡҙмҳҒмһҗк°Җ нӣ„мІҳлҰ¬н•ҳлҸ„лЎқ audit metadata мң м§Җ). **Graceful**
  вҖ” missing pack file вҶ’ 0 rows + empty out file. Malformed JSONL line
  + л№„ dict + prompt/chosen/rejected str лҲ„лқҪ row лҠ” silently drop.
  **ValueError** вҖ” `SUPPORTED_TARGETS = ("trl", "openai", "bedrock")`
  мҷё target. ліё PR мқҖ transform л§Ң; CLI integration + network upload
  + PII redaction (M4.3) мқҖ нӣ„мҶҚ. **14 invariant test** вҖ” TRL minimal
  triple / OpenAI messages schema / Bedrock fitness ліҙмЎҙ + лҲ„лқҪ graceful
  / SUPPORTED_TARGETS manifest / publish_pack one-row-per-pack-row /
  overwrite / byte-equal rerun / missing pack empty file / invalid
  target ValueError / malformed line drop / openai+bedrock dispatch /
  no-network import guard (forbidden SDK 8мў… stdlib мҷё лҜём Ғмһ¬).

- **PR-M4.1 вҖ” DPO canonical preference-pack JSONL writer (ADR-012).**
  Consumes M4.0 мқҳ `eval_response_recorded` event stream вҶ’ к°Ғ unique
  `prompt` group мқ„ chosen pile (`rollback_flag=False`) + rejected pile
  (`rollback_flag=True`) лЎң л¶„н•  вҶ’ **top-fitness chosen Г— bottom-fitness
  rejected** 1 pair лҘј emit (к°ҖмһҘ м„ лӘ…н•ң fitness margin = DPO н•ҷмҠө мӢ нҳё
  мөңлҢҖ). **мӢ к·ң лӘЁл“Ҳ** `core/self_improving_loop/dpo_pack.py` вҖ”
  `build_dpo_pack(journal_paths, pack_path) -> BuildResult` (appended /
  duplicate / events_seen / unpaired count) + `pair_signature(prompt,
  chosen, rejected)` 16-hex мӢқлі„мһҗ + `BuildResult` frozen dataclass.
  **Idempotency** вҖ” signature-keyed dedup мңјлЎң мһ¬мӢӨн–ү мӢң мӢ к·ң pair л§Ң
  append; кё°мЎҙ pack rows ліҙмЎҙ. **Graceful** вҖ” missing journal file вҶ’
  empty мІҳлҰ¬, malformed JSONL line мқҖ silently drop (per-line parse
  guard). Pack кІҪлЎң `GLOBAL_DPO_PACK_PATH = ~/.geode/self-improving-loop/dpo/pack.jsonl`
  (operator-local, NOT git-tracked вҖ” preference data лҠ” M4.3 redaction
  к№Ңм§Җ мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗ-мӮ¬м Ғ). **Pack schema** вҖ” `signature` / `prompt` /
  `chosen` / `rejected` / `fitness_chosen` / `fitness_rejected` /
  `fitness_delta` / `ts_chosen` / `ts_rejected` / `session_id_chosen` /
  `session_id_rejected` / `source_chosen` / `source_rejected` (13
  field). ліё PR мқҖ transform л§Ң; M4.2 publisher (OpenAI / Bedrock /
  HuggingFace TRL adapter) лҠ” нӣ„мҶҚ. **12 invariant test** вҖ” signature
  determinism + field-sensitivity / empty journal / missing-file
  graceful / pair-selection topГ—bottom / chosen-only + rejected-only
  unpaired / idempotency мһ¬мӢӨн–ү zero append / мӢ к·ң prompt л§Ң append /
  multi-journal cross-session merge / malformed line drop. Rafailov
  2023 DPO formulation мқҳ `(x, y_w, y_l)` triple кіј м§Ғм ‘ м •н•©.

- **PR-M4.0 вҖ” `eval_response_recorded` SessionJournal event (ADR-012).**
  DPO pipeline (M4.x) мқҳ мІ« piece вҖ” к°Ғ (prompt, response) turn л§ҲлӢӨ
  fitness мёЎм •к°’ + нҸүк°Җ metadata лҘј active SessionJournal м—җ emit.
  M4.1 мқҳ DPO canonical pack JSONL writer к°Җ мқҙ stream мқ„ л”°лқјк°Җл©°
  chosen/rejected pile лқјлІЁл§Ғ. **мӢ к·ң лӘЁл“Ҳ**
  `core/self_improving_loop/eval_journaling.py` вҖ” `EVENT_NAME` constant +
  `emit_eval_response_recorded(prompt, response, fitness_score,
  axis_scores, source, rollback_flag)` helper. Active scope мҷём—җм„ң
  graceful no-op (False л°ҳнҷҳ) вҖ” нҳём¶ңмһҗ try/except л¶Ҳн•„мҡ”. `rollback_flag`
  к°Җ True л©ҙ user revert мӢ нҳё (M4.1 rejected лқјлІЁ). `axis_scores` к°Җ
  None / л№Ҳ dict л©ҙ payload key omit (forward-compat). int / bool к°’мқҖ
  float coerce. ліё PR мқҖ emit н•ЁмҲҳ + payload schema л§Ң; emit нҳём¶ң site
  (Petri audit / live session / replay test л“ұ) лҠ” нӣ„мҶҚ PR м—җм„ң wiring.
  **11 invariant test** вҖ” event name + no-scope no-op + minimal payload +
  full payload + rollback flag (true/default) + axis_scores omit (None /
  empty) + float coerce 2 + multi-event append. Voyager / STaR мқҳ
  successful-trajectory journaling нҢЁн„ҙ к·ёлҢҖлЎң.

- **PR-M3 вҖ” Few-shot exemplar pool мһҗлҸҷ м Ғмһ¬ (ADR-012).** S5 (#1425)

  мң м§Җ (`_parse_jsonl` лӢЁмң„). bool fitness_delta л“ұ type trap вҶ’

  мқҳ stable prefix лЎң мһҗм—°мҠӨлҹҪкІҢ м •л ¬. **23 invariant test** вҖ”

  missing field / non-dict / fitness coerce / bool trap / strict /

  exemplar лЎң мһ¬нҲ¬мһ….

- **PR-M1 вҖ” Skill mutation slot к°ңнҶө (ADR-012).** T2 (#1418) мқҳ

  (`{skill_name: {description, user_invocable}}`) вҖ” mutation row мқҳ

- **PR-S4 вҖ” task-completion seed cohort (ADR-012).** seed-generation м—җ
  cohort к°ңл…җ лҸ„мһ… вҖ” м–ҙл–Ө *axis* мқҳ regression мқ„ лӢӨмқҢ generation мқҙ кіөкІ©н• м§Җ
  кІ°м •. `petri_17dim` (default, BC) мҷҖ `task_completion` (S4 мӢ м„Ө) 2 cohort
  лЎң мӢңмһ‘, м¶”нӣ„ `admire_routing` / `bench_capability` нҷ•мһҘ forward-compat.
  **`plugins/seed_generation/baseline_reader.py`**: (a) 3 мӢ к·ң constant
  `PETRI_17DIM_COHORT` / `TASK_COMPLETION_COHORT` / `SEED_COHORTS` export,
  (b) мӢ к·ң picker `pick_regression_target(snapshot, cohort)` вҖ” cohort лі„
  signal direction мІҳлҰ¬: petri лҠ” MAX (лҶ’мқ„мҲҳлЎқ concerning, rubric
  invariant), task_completion мқҖ MIN (ux_means мқҳ normalized-higher-is-better
  contract л”°лқј lowest к°Җ worst). Tie-break alphabetical. Unknown cohort
  вҶ’ `ValueError`. **`plugins/seed_generation/orchestrator.py:PipelineState`**:
  `cohort: str = "petri_17dim"` field м¶”к°Җ (BC). **кё°мЎҙ
  `pick_regression_target_dim` unchanged** вҖ” pre-S4 caller к·ёлҢҖлЎң.
  **13 invariant test** вҖ” cohort enum 3 + petri picker 2 +
  task_completion picker 3 + validation 2 + BC 2 + export 1.
  Generator/critic/evolver мқҳ cohort-specific prompt + CLI `--cohort`
  flag мқҖ S4b нӣ„мҶҚ PR (мқҙ PR мқҖ picker + state schema л§Ң).

- **PR-S3 вҖ” кіөлҸҷ ratchet: 4м¶• baseline.json (ADR-012).** `baseline.json`
  schema к°Җ pre-S3 `{dim_means, dim_stderr}` м—җм„ң S3 мқҳ **5-field 4м¶•
  schema** `{dim_means, dim_stderr, ux_means, admire_means, bench_means}`
  лЎң нҷ•мһҘ. compute_fitness лҠ” мқҙлҜё 4м¶• signature мҳҖмңјлӮҳ `_write_baseline`
  / `_load_baseline` к°Җ dim л§Ң persist н–ҲлҚҳ GAP мқ„ closure. seed-generation
  мқҳ `BaselineSnapshot` лҸ„ 3 мӢ к·ң field м¶”к°Җ (`ux_means` / `admire_means`
  / `bench_means`) вҖ” лӘЁл‘җ default `{}` лЎң pre-S3 baseline к·ёлҢҖлЎң graceful
  лЎңл”©. `autoresearch/train.py`: (a) `_write_baseline` к°Җ 3 мӢ к·ң axis
  kwarg-optional (`None`/`{}` мқҖ payload omit, backwards compat),
  (b) `_load_baseline` 5-tuple л°ҳнҷҳ + мӢ к·ң `_coerce_axis_dict` helper
  лЎң per-axis graceful drop (лӢЁмқј axis мҶҗмғҒмқҙ load-bearing dim л¶Җл¶„мқ„
  invalidate лӘ»н•Ё), (c) main мқҳ `compute_fitness` нҳём¶ңмқҙ baseline_bench_means
  лҸ„ м „лӢ¬ вҶ’ S6 cross-validation gate мқҳ baseline мёЎмқҖ disk нҶөн•© мҷ„лЈҢ
  (current `bench_means`/`ux_means`/`admire_means` collector wiring мқҖ
  S1b/S2b/S6b нӣ„мҶҚ PR вҖ” к·ё PR к°Җ main() м—җ current axis л§Ң м¶”к°Җн•ҳл©ҙ
  S6 gate мҰүмӢң л°ңнҷ”),
  (d) `baseline_decision` journal event м—җ `baseline_axis_coverage`
  (ux/admire/bench мқҳ entry к°ҜмҲҳ) surface вҖ” partial baseline к°ҖмӢңм„ұ.
  `plugins/seed_generation/baseline_reader.py`: `BaselineSnapshot` м—җ
  ux/admire/bench 3 field м¶”к°Җ, `load_baseline` к°Җ 3 axis лҸ„ `_coerce_dim_dict`
  нҶөн•ҙ graceful лЎңл”©. **14 invariant test** вҖ” loader 6 (5-tuple shape +
  missing file + pre-S3 BC + full S3 + per-axis corruption isolation +
  missing dim_means) + writer 3 (default omit + full 4-axis + empty-axis
  omit) + round-trip 1 + snapshot 3 (3 new fields + populated + pre-S3
  empty) + main wiring source-grep 1. ADR-012 S1/S2/S6 мқҳ in-memory 4м¶•
  fitness к°Җ мқҙм ң disk к№Ңм§Җ нҶөн•© вҖ” joint ratchet мҷ„м„ұ.

- **PR-T6 вҖ” Heuristic indicators JSON mutation surface (ADR-013).**
  mutator к°Җ keyword/phrase library лҘј evolve вҖ” task-triage мӢң л§Өм№ӯлҗҳлҠ”
  complexity / high_risk / time_pressure н‘ңм§Җм–ҙ. Promptbreeder-мӢқ
  м§„нҷ”: 3 group мқҳ phrase list к°Җ JSON м—җм„ң mutate вҶ’ agent мқҳ task
  classification м •нҷ•лҸ„ вҶ’ м Ғм Ҳн•ң strategy м„ нғқ (careful/fast,
  confirm-first/proceed) вҶ’ ux_means.success_rate мҳҒн–Ҙ. **T3 (style
  guide enum)** кіј л¶„лҰ¬: T3 лҠ” fixed style м„ нғқ, T6 лҠ” concrete phrase
  library. **5-element нҢЁн„ҙ** (S0a кІҖмҰқ): SoT
  `autoresearch/state/policies/heuristics.json` (in-repo) +
  `~/.geode/self-improving-loop/heuristics.json` (operator-local) /
  `GLOBAL_HEURISTICS_PATH` + `OPERATOR_LOCAL_HEURISTICS_PATH`
  `core/paths.py` м¶”к°Җ / `core/agent/heuristics_policy.py` reader
  (`_load_heuristics_override` + `apply_heuristics_policy`, schema
  `{complexity_indicators / high_risk_indicators / time_pressure_indicators:
  list[str]}`) / `core/agent/system_prompt.py:build_system_prompt` к°Җ
  T3 style-guide apply м§Ғнӣ„ `static = apply_heuristics_policy(static,
  _load_heuristics_override())` нҳём¶ң вҶ’ static (cache-eligible) мҳҒм—ӯм—җ
  `<heuristic_indicators>` лё”лЎқ append (м •мұ… л¶Җмһ¬ мӢң static к·ёлҢҖлЎң вҖ”
  no behavior change) / `GEODE_HEURISTICS_OVERRIDE` +
  `GEODE_HEURISTICS_STRICT=1` env pair. `_coerce` к°Җ unknown group +
  empty string + duplicate phrase м…Ӣ лӢӨ graceful drop (forward-compat +
  order-preserving dedupe). XML escape лЎң `<`, `&`, `"` м•Ҳм „ мІҳлҰ¬.
  **25 invariant test** вҖ” reader graceful/strict 13 + apply 7 + wiring +
  path + env + ALIVE marker. Frontier: Promptbreeder (Fernando et al.,
  2023) curriculum loop. **T6 лЁём§Җ мӢң ADR-013 6 surface мӢңнҖҖмҠӨ мў…кІ°**
  (T1 #1416 + T2 #1418 + T3 #1419 + T4 #1420 + T5 #1421 + T6 #1422).

- **PR-T5 вҖ” Cache breakpoint policy JSON mutation surface (ADR-013).**
  mutator к°Җ Anthropic API мқҳ `apply_messages_cache_control(messages,
  n_breakpoints=N)` мқҳ N к°’мқ„ JSON мңјлЎң mutate (0..3, Anthropic cap мқҳ
  messages-block м җмң л¶„). **trade-off**: вҶ‘ вҶ’ cache hit rate вҶ‘ but
  per-call overhead вҶ‘ (к°Ғ breakpoint к°Җ $0.10/MTok overhead); вҶ“ вҶ’ cache
  hit вҶ“ but per-call cost вҶ“. ux_means.token_cost_norm + latency_norm
  л‘ҳ лӢӨ мҳҒн–Ҙ. **5-element нҢЁн„ҙ** (S0a кІҖмҰқ): SoT
  `autoresearch/state/policies/cache-policy.json` (in-repo) +
  `~/.geode/self-improving-loop/cache-policy.json` (operator-local) /
  `GLOBAL_CACHE_POLICY_PATH` + `OPERATOR_LOCAL_CACHE_POLICY_PATH`
  `core/paths.py` м¶”к°Җ / `core/llm/cache_policy.py` reader
  (`_load_cache_policy_override` + `apply_cache_policy_breakpoints`,
  schema `{messages_breakpoints: int 0..3}`) / `core/llm/providers/
  anthropic.py` мқҳ streaming кІҪлЎң (нҳ„мһ¬ нҷңм„ұ single consumer) м—җм„ң
  `n_breakpoints = apply_cache_policy_breakpoints(MAX_MESSAGE_CACHE_BREAKPOINTS,
  _load_cache_policy_override())` нҳём¶ң вҶ’ `apply_messages_cache_control(
  messages, n_breakpoints=n_breakpoints)` лЎң wire (м •мұ… л¶Җмһ¬ мӢң default
  3 вҖ” no behavior change) / `GEODE_CACHE_POLICY_OVERRIDE` +
  `GEODE_CACHE_POLICY_STRICT=1` env pair. `_validate_schema` к°Җ Python
  `bool` мқ„ лӘ…мӢңм ҒмңјлЎң int м—җм„ң м ңмҷё (Python мқҳ bool-is-int subclass
  н•Ём • л°©м–ҙ). out-of-range к°’ (4, -1, ...) мқҖ `_coerce` м—җм„ң per-axis
  graceful drop. **20 invariant test** вҖ” reader graceful/strict 10 +
  apply 5 + wiring + path + env + ALIVE marker. Frontier: Anthropic
  prompt caching docs вҖ” `cache_control` count к°Җ canonical knob.

- **PR-T4 вҖ” Provider routing JSON mutation surface (ADR-013).** mutator
  к°Җ per-model preferred plan-chain мқ„ JSON мңјлЎң mutate. `resolve_routing(
  model)` мқҳ explicit-chain branch к°Җ registry's `set_routing` кІ°кіј лҢҖмӢ 
  policy override мқҳ chain мқ„ iterate вҶ’ ux_means.token_cost_norm м§Ғм ‘
  мҳҒн–Ҙ (к°ҷмқҖ model мқ„ PAYG лҢҖмӢ  SUBSCRIPTION мңјлЎң route н•ҳл©ҙ per-call
  cost к°җмҶҢ). **5-element нҢЁн„ҙ** (S0a кІҖмҰқ): SoT
  `autoresearch/state/policies/provider-routing.json` (in-repo) +
  `~/.geode/self-improving-loop/provider-routing.json` (operator-local) /
  `GLOBAL_PROVIDER_ROUTING_PATH` + `OPERATOR_LOCAL_PROVIDER_ROUTING_PATH`
  `core/paths.py` м¶”к°Җ / `core/llm/routing/provider_routing_policy.py`
  reader (`_load_provider_routing_override` +
  `apply_provider_routing_policy`, schema `{model_name: [plan_id_chain]}`) /
  `core/llm/routing/plan_registry.py:resolve_routing` explicit-chain branch
  к°Җ `apply_provider_routing_policy(model, registry.get_routing(model),
  _load_provider_routing_override())` кІ°кіј iterate (м •мұ… л¶Җмһ¬ мӢң default
  chain вҖ” no behavior change) / `GEODE_PROVIDER_ROUTING_OVERRIDE` +
  `GEODE_PROVIDER_ROUTING_STRICT=1` env pair. `_coerce` к°Җ empty chain +
  empty string entry м ңкұ°. л“ұлЎқлҗҳм§Җ м•ҠмқҖ plan_id лҠ” `resolve_routing` мқҙ
  мһҗлҸҷмңјлЎң кұҙл„ҲлңҖ (registry.get кІ°кіј None мқј л•Ң skip). **21 invariant
  test** вҖ” reader graceful/strict 10 + apply 6 мјҖмқҙмҠӨ (none / empty /
  model-not-in-policy / override / empty-chain-fallthrough / return-copy)
  + wiring + path + env + ALIVE marker. Frontier: OpenRouterмқҳ explicit
  per-model plan ordering + Anthropic/OpenAI multi-tier credential
  (subscription/PAYG/batch) мқҳ cost lever.

- **PR-T3 вҖ” Response style guide JSON mutation surface (ADR-013).** mutator
  к°Җ 4 typed enum field (`tone` вҲҲ concise/balanced/verbose, `verbosity_level`
  вҲҲ low/medium/high, `response_format` вҲҲ markdown/plain/structured,
  `code_style` вҲҲ show-first/explain-first) мқ„ JSON мңјлЎң mutate. wrapper-
  sections.json (G5a/G5b) мқҳ free-form н…ҚмҠӨнҠё mutation кіј л¶„лҰ¬ вҖ” T3 лҠ”
  **constrained typed м„ нғқм§Җ** лқј мһ‘мқҖ expressive style space лҘј нҡЁмңЁм ҒмңјлЎң
  нғҗмғү к°ҖлҠҘ. fitness 4м¶•мқҳ `ux_means` (success_rate + revert_ratio) м§Ғм ‘
  мҳҒн–Ҙ. **5-element нҢЁн„ҙ** (S0a кІҖмҰқ): SoT
  `autoresearch/state/policies/style-guide.json` (in-repo, ratchet-tracked) +
  `~/.geode/self-improving-loop/style-guide.json` (operator-local) /
  `GLOBAL_STYLE_GUIDE_PATH` + `OPERATOR_LOCAL_STYLE_GUIDE_PATH`
  `core/paths.py` м¶”к°Җ / `core/agent/style_guide_policy.py` reader
  (`_load_style_guide_override` + `apply_style_guide_policy`, schema
  `{tone, verbosity_level, response_format, code_style}` enum-typed) /
  `core/agent/system_prompt.py:build_system_prompt` к°Җ `static =
  apply_style_guide_policy(static, _load_style_guide_override())` лЎң
  static мҳҒм—ӯ (cache-eligible) м—җ `<response_style>` лё”лЎқ append (м •мұ…
  л¶Җмһ¬ мӢң static к·ёлҢҖлЎң вҖ” no behavior change) / `GEODE_STYLE_GUIDE_OVERRIDE`
  + `GEODE_STYLE_GUIDE_STRICT=1` env pair (`autoresearch/train.py` audit
  subprocess). `_coerce` к°Җ unknown field + unknown enum value л‘ҳ лӢӨ
  graceful drop вҖ” forward-compat + per-axis isolation (н•ң axis к°Җ к№Ём ёлҸ„
  лӢӨлҘё axes лҠ” мң нҡЁ). **22 invariant test** вҖ” reader graceful/strict 10 +
  apply 7 мјҖмқҙмҠӨ (none / empty / single / all / unknown-enum / empty-base /
  field order) + wiring + path + env + ALIVE marker. Frontier: OpenAI /
  Anthropic system prompt guides converge on enum-based response constraints.

- **PR-T2 вҖ” Skill catalog JSON mutation surface (ADR-013).** mutator
  к°Җ skill `description` (LLM лқјмҡ°нҢ… нӮӨ) + `user_invocable` (к°ҖмӢңм„ұ) мқ„
  per-skill лӢЁмң„лЎң JSON мңјлЎң mutate вҶ’ agent мқҳ skill м„ нғқ м •нҷ•лҸ„ вҶ‘
  (Voyager мӢқ curriculum м§„нҷ” нҢЁн„ҙ). **5-element нҢЁн„ҙ** (S0a кІҖмҰқ):
  SoT `autoresearch/state/policies/skill-catalog.json` (in-repo,
  ratchet-tracked) + `~/.geode/self-improving-loop/skill-catalog.json`
  (operator-local) / `GLOBAL_SKILL_CATALOG_PATH` + `OPERATOR_LOCAL_SKILL_
  CATALOG_PATH` `core/paths.py` м¶”к°Җ / `core/skills/skill_catalog_policy.py`
  reader (`_load_skill_catalog_override` + `apply_skill_catalog_policy`,
  schema `{skill_name: {description: str, user_invocable: bool}}`) /
  `core/agent/loop/_context.py` мқҳ `_build_system_prompt` к°Җ кё°мЎҙ
  `registry.get_context_block()` нҳём¶ң мһҗлҰ¬м—җ `apply_skill_catalog_policy(
  registry, _load_skill_catalog_override())` нҳём¶ң (м •мұ… л¶Җмһ¬ мӢң base
  registry мқҳ `get_context_block` мңјлЎң мң„мһ„ вҖ” no behavior change) /
  `GEODE_SKILL_CATALOG_OVERRIDE` + `GEODE_SKILL_CATALOG_STRICT=1` env
  pair (`autoresearch/train.py` мқҳ audit subprocess к°Җ SoT мЎҙмһ¬ мӢң л‘ҳ
  лӢӨ inject вҖ” strict-fail мҳөнҠёмқё). `apply_skill_catalog_policy` лҠ”
  registry мқҳ base XML л ҢлҚ”л§Ғ лЎңм§Ғмқ„ мһ¬мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳл©ҙм„ң per-skill override
  лҘј мҡ°м„  м Ғмҡ© вҖ” base registry к°Җ authoritative (unknown skill name мқҖ
  л¬ҙмӢң). Forward-compat: entry лӮҙ unknown field мһҗлҸҷ drop. **23
  invariant test** вҖ” reader graceful/strict + apply 9 мјҖмқҙмҠӨ (none /
  empty / desc / visibility true/false / unknown skill / empty registry /
  max_chars м ҲлӢЁ / XML escape) + context.py wiring source-grep + path
  мғҒмҲҳ 2 + env wiring + ALIVE marker. Frontier: Voyager (Wang et al.,
  2023) curriculum loop вҖ” agent к°Җ мһҗмІҙ skill library + description мқ„
  loop мңјлЎң к°ұмӢ . AlphaEvolve-мӢқ мҪ”л“ң mutation л°°м ң (skill body=SKILL.md
  лҠ” Tier 2, ліё surface лҜём ‘к·ј).

- **PR-BACKFILL-SOT вҖ” Operator-local SoT layer + env-as-SoT for 4 mutation
  surface readers (post-PR-T1 #1416 fix).** PR #1416 мқҳ Codex MCP FAIL #5
  (CHANGELOG/PR-body parity мң„л°ҳ вҖ” `~/.geode/self-improving-loop/...`
  operator-local fallback мқ„ мЈјмһҘн–ҲмңјлӮҳ reader мҪ”л“ң л¶Җмһ¬) мқҳ к·јмӣҗ GAP мқ„
  л©”мӣҖ. 4 reader (tool_policy / reflection / decomposition / tool_descriptions)
  к°Җ **3-layer SoT chain** мңјлЎң м „нҷҳ вҖ” мҡҙмҳҒмһҗ к°Җ env л§Ң set н•ҙлҸ„ SoT мІҳлҹј
  graceful лЎң лӢӨлЈ° мҲҳ мһҲкі , audit subprocess лҠ” лӘ…мӢңм Ғ STRICT flag opt-in.
  **мӢ к·ң helper** `core/self_improving_loop/sot_resolution.py` вҖ”
  `resolve_sot(env_var, operator_local, in_repo) вҶ’ SoTSelection(path,
  strict) | None` лӢЁмқј н•ЁмҲҳ, 4 reader к°Җ кіөмң . `<X>_STRICT` env name мқҖ
  `<X>_OVERRIDE` м—җм„ң `removesuffix("_OVERRIDE") + "_STRICT"` лЎң мһҗлҸҷ
  нҢҢмғқ вҖ” per-reader л“ұлЎқ л¶Ҳн•„мҡ”. **resolution order**: (1) env var
